videos.summary_source_text:
Stars Forward Jason Robertson Selected To 2025-26 NHL First All-Star Team | DLLS Stars Podcast Become a DLLS Diehard and get access to premium content, our Discord channel, discounts on merch, and a free shirt! Sign up here: https://alldlls.com/join-diehard/


The National Hockey League completed their announcement schedule for all of the 2025-26 NHL Awards winners, with yesterday’s news that Tampa Bay’s Nikita Kucherov won the Hart Trophy as the league’s most-valuable player. Today, we will review all the recipients and look at how close any Dallas Stars were in the voting to these awards. Then we’ll discuss last night’s Stanley Cup Final Game 5, with a full Luds’ What The Puck breakdown, as the Carolina Hurricanes took a 3-2 series lead over the Vegas Golden Knights. Then some NHL News & Notes, including the Stars being mentioned in the latest Dylan Larkin trade rumors.

videos.summary_source_text:
Texas Rangers Climb Back to .500 And More Wins Could Be Ahead | DLLS Rangers Podcast Take advantage of our Playoff Diehard Sale and join our community today! https://alldlls.com/stars-playoff-offer-youtube 

An ALLCITY Network Production

The Texas Rangers are back to .500 for the first time since May 1 thanks to four straight series wins. They took the series at Kansas City on Thursday with a 4-2 victory that featured a Corey Seager homer and another stellar bullpen performance by Jacob Latz. Next up is a three-game series at Boston, followed by a six-game homestand against Minnesota and San Diego. There is opportunity for the Rangers to climb above .500 and create some separation between the also-rans in the American League West.

videos.summary_source_text:
12.06.26 - Mindset Training with Joe 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.summary_source_text: The #1 Soccer Prospect in the State of Colorado is Heading to KU | GS MoodSwings On this special edition of MoodSwings with Liv Moods, Liv is joined by decorated Colorado soccer prospect Tuula Tarka. Tuula is ranked as the No. 1 women's soccer prospect in Colorado and has already committed to playing NCAA Division I soccer at the University of Kansas. Liv and Tuula discuss her journey as a player, the excitement of preparing to embark on the next stage of her career, and her long-term goal of playing professionally in the NWSL. Tune in for an inspiring conversation with one of Colorado's brightest young athletes as she reflects on her path to success and looks ahead to what comes next. videos.title: The Hurricanes Are One Win Away from the Stanley Cup | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
The Hurricanes Are One Win Away from the Stanley Cup | Daily Faceoff Live The Carolina Hurricanes are now just one win away from capturing the Stanley Cup after taking a commanding series lead. Tyler Yaremchuk and Jonny Lazarus break down Carolina's Game 4 victory, including big performances from Sebastian Aho and Andrei Svechnikov, and whether the Panthers should have considered a goaltending change after another tough night for Carter Hart.

We also dive into the 2026 Hart Trophy results as Nikita Kucherov narrowly edges Connor McDavid for MVP honors. Was the voting process flawed? Did McDavid deserve more recognition for carrying the Oilers through adversity? The guys debate some of the most controversial ballots from this year's vote.

Plus, we take a look at potential NHL buyout candidates this summer, answer your questions in #AskDFO, check in on the latest Conn Smythe Trophy odds, and wrap things up with Garbage Time.

videos.summary_source_text:
12.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

Breaking: Anthropic Pulls Fable-5 & Mythos-5 After US Government Directive (What We Know)

The video reports breaking news that Anthropic’s Claude models Fable-5 and Mythos-5 have been abruptly disabled after a US government directive, which reportedly suspends access for foreign nationals (including Anthropic employees), though the creator notes some users still appear to have access and is unsure why. The announcement was received at 5:21 PM ET on June 12 and provided no specific reason, but the creator suggests it may relate to alleged bypass techniques and model use for reading codebases and fixing software flaws. Anthropic says it added strong safeguards with US/UK and third-party help, believes the directive is a misunderstanding, and warns applying this standard broadly could halt frontier model deployments. The creator compares the situation to earlier incidents, notes Opus 4.8 remains available but feels like a step backward, and promotes Agent OS and the AI Profit Boardroom for switching between models and learning AI automation.

Can Vegas Force a Game 7? + The Problem With No Movement Clauses | DFO Rundown The Vegas Golden Knights are on the brink of elimination and will need a win in Game 6 to keep their Stanley Cup hopes alive.

Can they force a winner-take-all Game 7, or are the Carolina Hurricanes ready to finish the job?

Jason Gregor and Mike Rupp break down the biggest storylines heading into a pivotal Game 6, including Carter Hart's difficult Stanley Cup Final, Jordan Staal's incredible run and growing Conn Smythe Trophy case, and the impact of losing William Karlsson at the worst possible time.

The guys also discuss what Vegas needs to change, whether Carolina's stars have finally taken over the series, and who faces the most pressure with the Stanley Cup in the building.

videos.summary_source_text:
NHL Trade Matchmaker: Best Fits for Dylan Larkin, Elias Pettersson & Jason Robertson & More Matt Larkin's first NHL Trade Board of the offseason is here, and we're playing Summer Matchmaker with some of the biggest names who could be available this summer.

Full Trade Board: disq.us/t/55e35cn

Tyler Yaremchuk and Carter Hutton break down the most intriguing landing spots for Dylan Larkin, Brendan Gallagher, Elias Pettersson, and Jason Robertson while looking for the perfect fit outside the obvious destinations. Could Larkin be a fit in Anaheim or New Jersey? Does Pittsburgh make sense as a reclamation project for Pettersson? And which team should take a massive swing on Jason Robertson?

The guys also explore potential trade scenarios, discuss why Brendan Gallagher may still have value around the league, and debate whether NHL general managers should be preparing offer sheets for some cap-strapped contenders.

📈 Plus: Why Dallas could be vulnerable this summer and which teams should be the most aggressive heading into free agency.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | RBC Canadian Open | Round 2 | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | RBC Canadian Open | Round 2 | 2026 Check out all the best shots from Round 2 at the 2026 RBC Canadian Open, featuring Collin Morikawa, Sam Burns, Brooks Koepka and PGA TOUR University No. 1 Ben James, among others.

The PGA TOUR returns north of the border this week for the RBC Canadian Open, one of the longest-running events on the schedule and the third-oldest championship on the PGA TOUR calendar. TPC Toronto at Osprey Valley’s North Course hosts the national open for the second consecutive year, welcoming one of the strongest fields in tournament history as players make their final preparations for the U.S. Open. Four of the world’s top 10 players are set to tee it up, led by Matt Fitzpatrick, Justin Rose, Tommy Fleetwood and Collin Morikawa, who returns to the event for the first time since 2019. Recent PGA Championship winner Aaron Rai is back in action, while Brooks Koepka makes his first RBC Canadian Open appearance since 2019. Viktor Hovland adds further intrigue in his tournament debut, joining a field that also includes Robert MacIntyre, Sam Burns, Shane Lowry, Wyndham Clark, Tony Finau and Max Homa. Defending champion Ryan Fox returns looking to become the first player since Jhonattan Vegas to successfully defend the title. Home hopes will once again be high, with Corey Conners, Taylor Pendrith, Mackenzie Hughes and rookie Sudarshan Yellamaraju leading a strong Canadian contingent. Mike Weir is also set for his 33rd appearance in Canada’s national championship. In addition to 500 FedExCup points, a place in next week’s U.S. Open is available for the leading player not already exempt, adding another layer of significance to an already stacked championship. The PGA TOUR returns north of the border this week for the RBC Canadian Open, one of the longest-running events on the schedule and the third-oldest championship on the PGA TOUR calendar. TPC Toronto at Osprey Valley’s North Course hosts the national open for the second consecutive year, welcoming one of the strongest fields in tournament history as players make their final preparations for the U.S. Open. Four of the world’s top 10 players are set to tee it up, led by Matt Fitzpatrick, Justin Rose, Tommy Fleetwood and Collin Morikawa, who returns to the event for the first time since 2019. Recent PGA Championship winner Aaron Rai is back in action, while Brooks Koepka makes his first RBC Canadian Open appearance since 2019. Viktor Hovland adds further intrigue in his tournament debut, joining a field that also includes Robert MacIntyre, Sam Burns, Shane Lowry, Wyndham Clark, Tony Finau and Max Homa. Defending champion Ryan Fox returns looking to become the first player since Jhonattan Vegas to successfully defend the title. videos.title: What Does It Mean To Skate Downhill?
videos.summary_source_text:
What Does It Mean To Skate Downhill? The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

#train2point0 #downhillskating #hockeytraining #NHL The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

Train 2.0 is an online hockey development platform founded by Jason Yee: kinesiologist, former professional player, and UBC honors graduate. We give players and coaches a mechanical advantage by reverse-engineering elite NHL movements and making them available to players at every level.

videos.title: Ehlers ties Hurricanes history with 8 Stanley Cup Final points - so far! 🇩🇰🌀
videos.summary_source_text:
Ehlers ties Hurricanes history with 8 Stanley Cup Final points - so far! 🇩🇰🌀 What a Stanley Cup Final debut it's been for Nikolaj Ehlers! The "Great Dane" is living up to his nickname and then some, as through 5 games he ties Eric Staal for the most points in a single Stanley Cup Final in franchise history with 8 (3 goals, 5 assists for Ehlers). Ehlers' 8 points are also the most of any player in this series! Will Ehlers surpass Staal and stand alone in Hurricanes history? Tune into Game 6 of the Stanley Cup Final between the Carolina Hurricanes and Vegas Golden Knights on Sunday, June 14, to find out!

videos.title: How Sugar Creates Advanced Glycation End Products
videos.summary_source_text:
How Sugar Creates Advanced Glycation End Products Sugar's impact on the body is not limited to energy or calories. Once excess glucose and fructose are present, they can begin interacting with proteins in ways that create harmful byproducts known as advanced glycation end products, or AGEs. These compounds are associated with oxidative stress, inflammation, and many of the changes that occur as the body ages. The more we learn about these processes, the clearer it becomes that sugar affects far more than just blood sugar.

N2 Pro: Free Open-Source Chinese Coding Model Beating Claude & GPT on Benchmarks (260K Context)

The video introduces N2, a new free Chinese open-source model with open weights and a 260K-token context window, designed for coding and agentic workflows with strong tool/function calling. It highlights benchmark results where N2 outperforms paid APIs like Claude Opus 4.7, GPT 5.5, and DeepSeek V4 Pro on some tests (including SWE Bench), and notes it is based on Qwen 3.5’s architecture. The model is available on Hugging Face and via a free API on OpenRouter, and can be used inside agents such as Kilocode, Hermes Agent, Claude Code (via an open-source “Free Claude Code” project), OpenClaude, and Pi. The creator demonstrates configuring N2 in Hermes Agent using model profiles, compares N2 Pro and N2 Mini, and shows N2 responding faster than a Gemma 4 setup. The video ends by promoting training and resources in the AI Profit Boardroom.

videos.title: WHAT HAPPENS TO YOUR HEART AFTER 30 DAYS OF EATING SARDINES?   Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
WHAT HAPPENS TO YOUR HEART AFTER 30 DAYS OF EATING SARDINES?   Dr. Mandell Could one simple food transform your health in just 30 days? In this video, Dr. Mandell takes a deep dive into what may happen to your heart, arteries, brain, muscles, bones, and entire body when you eat sardines every day for one month. Rich in omega-3 fatty acids, complete protein, vitamin D, vitamin B12, selenium, calcium, phosphorus, and other essential nutrients, sardines are one of the most overlooked superfoods on the planet. Learn how these tiny fish may support healthy circulation, reduce inflammation, nourish your brain, strengthen your bones, improve muscle function, and provide your body with the building blocks it needs to thrive. Discover the science behind EPA and DHA, why sardines are naturally low in mercury compared to larger fish, and how one inexpensive dietary change could make a meaningful difference in your overall wellness. Watch until the end and decide if you're ready to take the 30-day sardine challenge.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: 🔥Healthy ice cream in 5 minutes + freezing! Sugar-free! Lactose-free! 3 main ingredients!
videos.summary_source_text:
🔥Healthy ice cream in 5 minutes + freezing! Sugar-free! Lactose-free! 3 main ingredients! 🔥Healthy ice cream in 5 minutes + freezing! Sugar-free! Lactose-free! 3 main ingredients! Delicious, super easy – I highly recommend it!

2 ripe bananas.
1/2 cup (120 ml) coconut milk.
1 tsp matcha green tea powder.
1 tbsp peanut butter.
Please give this video a like to save this healthy ice cream recipe. 💚
Place in the freezer for 1 hour. Remove, stir, and return to the freezer for another hour.
Sprinkle with sugar-free chocolate and pistachios on top.
If you enjoy sugar-free recipes, be sure to subscribe to Schnelle Rezepte! 🥰🌱

videos.title: Is GPT-6 Actually AGI? The Evidence-Based Truth
videos.summary_source_text:
Is GPT-6 Actually AGI? The Evidence-Based Truth 🔗 Newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/

Everyone's screaming GPT-6 is AGI and it's about to drop any day — but what has OpenAI actually said? In this video we go through every official OpenAI post, Sam Altman's real interviews, and the leaks that can actually be traced back to a source, separating confirmed facts from pure hype.


We start with where things stand right now: as of mid-2026, the newest shipped model is GPT-5.5 — there's no official GPT-6 announcement anywhere. Then we walk the full timeline of Altman's statements since GPT-5 launched, break down official word vs. the rumor mill, and pressure-test the four biggest claims floating around: persistent memory, a 2-million-token context window, native multimodality + agents, and massive training scale.
We also bring in the skeptics — including Gary Marcus pushing back hard on Altman's "we know how to build AGI" line — for a real counterweight, before steelmanning what it would actually mean if GPT-6 were AGI.


By the end, you'll have an honest, evidence-based probability estimate on whether GPT-6 will be AGI — and a clear list of what to actually watch for at launch instead of chasing thumbnail hype

No hype. Just the evidence. That's the BitBiased mission.

📌 What's your GPT-6 release prediction — and your AGI odds? Drop it in the comments, I read every one and I'll argue back.

⏱️ CHAPTERS

00:02:25 The Timeline, Without The Embellishment
00:04:14 Official Word vs The Rumor Mill
00:05:58 The Technical Reality Check
00:08:35 Alignment & Safety: Why This Actually Matters Here

00:11:27 If It Actually Were AGI: The Stakes

videos.title: Hurricanes Take 3-2 Series Lead, NHL Headlines & OHL Draft Tonight ft. Brian Burke & Bryan Crawford
videos.summary_source_text:
Hurricanes Take 3-2 Series Lead, NHL Headlines & OHL Draft Tonight ft. Brian Burke & Bryan Crawford The Carolina Hurricanes are one win away from the Stanley Cup. On today's episode of The Sheet, Jeff Marek opens the show by breaking down Carolina's massive Game 5 victory over the Vegas Golden Knights as Rod Brind'Amour's club takes a 3-2 series lead in the Stanley Cup Final. Jeff dives into the biggest storylines from the game, what went wrong for Vegas, and what to watch for as the series shifts toward a pivotal Game 6.

Later, Brian Burke joins the show for his weekly visit to discuss the latest news and notes from around the NHL, including the biggest offseason storylines, front office decisions, coaching chatter, and more as teams begin preparing for a busy summer.

Then, OHL Commissioner Bryan Crawford stops by ahead of the 2026 OHL Priority Selection to discuss draft day, the growth of the league, and what lies ahead for junior hockey. The conversation also looks back on the Rangers' Memorial Cup championship and explores the future of both the OHL and CHL as major changes continue to shape the landscape of junior hockey in Canada.

All that and more on today's edition of The Sheet with Jeff Marek.

videos.title: Grok 5 "AGI" — Fact or Hype? Here's What's Actually Confirmed
videos.summary_source_text:
Grok 5 "AGI" — Fact or Hype? Here's What's Actually Confirmed 🔗 Newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/

You've seen the headline — "Elon Musk says Grok 5 is AGI." Before you 
decide if that's the biggest AI story of the decade or just another tweet, here's the comparison the thumbnails never do honestly.


We went through every official xAI statement, every leaked spec, and every benchmark that actually exists for Grok 5 — separating what's genuinely confirmed from what's rumor, projection, and pure hype: the parameter counts, the Colossus 2 compute cluster, the multimodal claims, the release timeline, and Musk's own "10% chance of AGI" bet.

By the end you'll know exactly how seriously to take that headline — and where the real story actually is.

videos.title: The Most Effective Exercise for Fat Loss
videos.summary_source_text:
The Most Effective Exercise for Fat Loss Walking is one of the simplest ways to support fat loss, but only if you stop treating it like casual movement and start treating it like training.

If your goal is to lose weight, burn fat, and get lean, walking can be a powerful addition to your routine because it is low impact, easy to recover from, and easy to do consistently. The key is to walk with purpose. Stand tall, pick up the pace, lengthen your stride, and make every step count.

Walking for fat loss works best when it is combined with strength training. Lift to build muscle, then use walking to increase your daily activity and help reveal the body you are building.

If you are looking for a workout program to help you build muscle in the process of burning fat, be sure to get your FREE total body workout plan here:
https://www.athleanx.com/tbfree

For more tips on how to burn fat and get lean, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so that you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

videos.title: 1 MORE! The Carolina Hurricanes CONTROLLED Game 5, Winning 4-2 to Be 1 Win Away from the Stanley Cup
videos.summary_source_text:
1 MORE! The Carolina Hurricanes CONTROLLED Game 5, Winning 4-2 to Be 1 Win Away from the Stanley Cup The Carolina Hurricanes are ONE WIN AWAY from bringing their second-ever Stanley Cup to Raleigh after their 4-2 win in Game 5. It was their most complete Hurricanes win of the series, coming at the right time after winning back-to-back games. What stood out in the win, and how does this set up for a huge moment on Sunday night for Game 6? On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on it being the most complete win for the Hurricanes in the Stanley Cup Final. After being down 1-0 in the first period, they ripped off four straight goals and went on to win Game 5. Jordan Staal stays red hot as he scored his sixth of the series. Brandon Bussi won his second Stanley Cup Final game, putting him into some rarified air. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on Sebastian Aho and Andrei svehnikov having themselevs a welcome to the Cup Final moments. They scored three huge goals en route to the win. Also, Nikolaj Ehlers continues to show why the Hurricanes put him as their top target in free agency last summer. He's been rolling all season and has come as advertised. Finally, now that they're one win from a second Stanley Cup, what could be expected in Game 6 on Sunday? What do the Hurricanes need to do to close it out in Vegas? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: 🔴 LIVE | The Women's Amateur Championship Golf | Quarter & Semi Finals
videos.summary_source_text:
🔴 LIVE | The Women's Amateur Championship Golf | Quarter & Semi Finals SUBSCRIBE -  https://bit.ly/RandaGolfSubscribe

The championship, founded in 1893, attracts an international field with an impressive list of former winners including McCormack Medal winner Leona Maguire and major champions Georgia Hall and Anna Nordqvist.

This year's Women's Amateur Championship will take place at Muirfield in Scotland from 22-27 June. Muirfield hosted the AIG Women's Open in 2022 and is regarded as one of the best links courses in the world.

Paula Martin Sampedro claimed victory in The 122nd Women's Amateur Championship at Nairn in June 2025, the Spaniard edged out the USA's Farah O'Keefe 2&1 in a fabulous 36-hole final that saw both players excel.

Turn One Hermes Agent Into a Full AI Team (Agent OS + Obsidian Memory Galaxy + Kanban vs Paperclip)

videos.title: One Win Away For The Canes | Morning Cuppa Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
One Win Away For The Canes | Morning Cuppa Hockey Season 3 Episode 147 of Morning Cuppa Hockey is LIVE with your host Jonny Lazarus and former NHL defenceman Colby Cohen, and the Stanley Cup is officially one win away from being hoisted after Carolina's massive 4-2 Game 5 victory in Raleigh. 

The Hurricanes now lead 3-2 with a chance to close it out in Vegas on Sunday, and the guys break it all down with a stacked lineup. 

Former NHL defenceman Mathieu Schneider joins the show to dig into Game 5, Brandon Bussi's incredible emergence, and what Carolina needs to do to finish the job on the road, plus his thoughts on the Mike Babcock investigation given his own history playing under Babcock in Detroit. 

Then NHL.com's Dan Rosen, who's been on the ground all series, gives an inside look at the mood in both locker rooms heading into a potential Cup-clinching Game 6. 

Finally, James van Riemsdyk stops by to talk Cup Final, his own Babcock connection in Toronto, and what it's like suiting up alongside Dylan Larkin in Detroit as trade rumours swirl around his teammate. 

Don't miss a second of the daily hockey talk!

videos.summary_source_text:
🔴 LIVE | The Amateur Championship Golf | FINAL SUBSCRIBE -  https://bit.ly/RandaGolfSubscribe

This year a world-class field featuring golfers from 41 countries will gather at Royal Liverpool and West Lancashire from 15 to 20 June.

This represents the Championship's record 19th staging at Hoylake, with 288 players competing for one of the top titles in amateur golf and to follow in the footsteps of past champions including Bobby Jones, José María Olazábal, Sergio Garcia and Matteo Manassero.

Contested over stroke play and then match play, the winner will earn exemptions into The Open, the US Open, a DP World Tour event and, by tradition, an invitation to compete in the Masters Tournament provided they retain their amateur status.

videos.title: What is Elite Blade Performance Profiling? // Inside Look
videos.summary_source_text:
What is Elite Blade Performance Profiling? // Inside Look In this video, Chase with IW sits down with JP at Elite Blade Performance Technology to break down what performance profiling is and how it can change the way your skates feel on the ice. JP explains how the shape along the bottom of your steel affects key performance characteristics like speed, stability, agility, power, and glide.

They also walk through Elite’s two main profile families. The Heel Glide family adds a slight forward pitch for players who prefer a more aggressive skating stance, while the Center Glide family delivers a neutral balance with a smooth, powerful glide zone through the middle of the blade. Whether you are exploring profiling for the first time or looking to fine-tune your setup, this video will help you understand which style may best complement your game.

In this video, we cover:
✅ What a skate blade profile is and how radius is measured
✅ The difference between a stock profile and a performance profile
✅ How profiling can enhance speed, stability, agility, power, and glide
✅ The differences between Elite’s Heel Glide and Center Glide profile families
✅ Why the Polaris Heel Glide profile has become such a popular option
✅ How the SCS 1 maximizes agility with more aggressive release zones
✅ How the SCS 2 adds stability, glide, and top-end speed
✅ How to determine which profile style may best suit your skating preferences

videos.title: We Task Two Tour Pros to Try and Break 50
videos.summary_source_text:
We Task Two Tour Pros to Try and Break 50 Angel Hidalgo and Alejandro Del Rey take on the Break 50 Challenge at Real Club de Golf El Prat in Barcelona, Spain. The rules are simple: both players tee off from the front tees, with the lowest score on each hole counting toward the total. Let’s find out if they can pull it off, or if the course proves too tough for the Spanish duo.

videos.title: New BMW M3 just DESTROYED AMG!
videos.summary_source_text:
New BMW M3 just DESTROYED AMG! This all-new concept car illustrates what the first all-electric BMW M3 could look like. We will run you through the design, likely performance figures, and everything else you need to know. 

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-12-06

Introducing the all-new BMW M3!

…Well, not exactly. This is the M Concept Neue Klasse - a concept car that is designed to illustrate what the first M-powered version of the BMW i3 could look like! 

(Fear not though, petrol-heads - there’s still a new petrol-powered M3 on the horizon!)

First up, let’s check out the design - and there’s no denying BMW has tried to give this car as much presence as possible! Up front there’s a massive flat grille with the headlights inside, colourful DRLs (usually reserved for CS models), and massive louvres in the bonnet! Along the side, the door mirrors have been updated and M-coloured graphics added to the carbon fibre roof, while around the back there are TWO ducktail spoilers and a huge rear diffuser! 

On the inside, the main talking points are the racing bucket seats with 4-point racing harnesses! There’s also an updated steering wheel, M graphics and colours throughout the cabin, and a new drive selector. Otherwise, though, the interior is largely similar to the regular i3. 

Then we come to the performance. While BMW hasn’t confirmed any figures or stats, we’re expecting the car to come with four electric motors, and we believe these could combine to produce at least 800hp - making it the most powerful BMW road car of all-time! 

As for the price? Well, that’s yet to be confirmed, but we can’t see it being any cheaper than £100,000! But what are your thoughts on this all-electric M? Let us know in the comments! videos.title: How to Get Rid of Belly Fat?
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Get Rid of Belly Fat? How do you get rid of belly fat?

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4x4Yr7H

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

One of the most important factors in stubborn abdominal fat is insulin and how it influences fat storage in the body.

Reducing insulin levels can be supported by lowering carbohydrate intake and avoiding frequent spikes in blood sugar. This helps the body shift toward using stored fat for energy.

Intermittent fasting is another strategy often used to support this process. Approaches like reducing eating windows or practicing one meal per day can help the body spend more time in a fat-burning state.

Watch until the end to understand how insulin, fasting, and fat metabolism work together.

videos.summary_source_text:
Can I Break 75 at Shinnecock Hills? (US OPEN) ONE BILLION VIEWS. Every single one of them is down to you. Thank you for being part of this journey. Here's to the next billion.

I'm playing Shinnecock Hills in full US Open setup, just weeks before the best players in the world arrive. The same rough, the same lightning-fast greens, and the same brutal pin positions that will decide a major championship. One of America's oldest golf clubs is at its absolute hardest, and I'm finding out exactly what the pros are about to face.

Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

LIMITED EDITION MERCH (UK & US)

Website: http://www.rickshiels.com/

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. ONE BILLION VIEWS. Every single one of them is down to you. Thank you for being part of this journey. Here's to the next billion.

I'm playing Shinnecock Hills in full US Open setup, just weeks before the best players in the world arrive. The same rough, the same lightning-fast greens, and the same brutal pin positions that will decide a major championship. One of America's oldest golf clubs is at its absolute hardest, and I'm finding out exactly what the pros are about to face.

The #1 Best Protein in the World (And It Costs Under $1) The best protein in the world isn’t chicken breast, whey protein, steak, salmon, bone broth, or protein powder. It’s eggs.

🌟10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4e4cByv

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Why eggs stand out:
• Complete protein with all essential amino acids
• Rich in choline for brain health
• Highly bioavailable
• Extremely nutrient-dense
• Affordable and satisfying
• Most of the nutrition is in the yolk

Three to four pasture-raised eggs per day provide one of the most nutrient-dense protein sources available.

#protein #eggs #highprotein #nutrition #choline #healthyfoods #musclebuilding #healthtips #wellness #weightloss

Claude Fable 5 Runs My Entire Life (5 Builds) I'm sharing all 5 prompts, plus a weekly live build and my command centre repo inside my community.
👉 Join here: https://mrc.fm/cmc

I handed Claude Fable 5 the keys to my entire life, and for the next 10 days it's free inside your Claude plan. Here are 5 things Claude Code now runs for me start to finish, from clearing my inbox in Claude chat to running my whole server fleet in Claude Code.

I started in plain Claude chat with a Gmail MCP connection, moved to Claude Cowork driving my browser, then finished in Claude Code doing full ops. Fable 5 didn't just do the task. It looked around, audited my AWS account, found a leaking bucket and 8 year old keys, and saved me a fortune.

The 5 builds:

1. Clear my inbox with Claude chat + Gmail MCP
2. File my invoices with Claude Cowork
3. Kill a $149/mo SaaS with Amazon SES in Claude Code
4. Audit and rotate my AWS keys (the Fable 5 moment)
5. Run my Hetzner fleet behind Zero Trust

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch

• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

Claude AI SEO System: Automate Keyword Research + Deploy 5 Articles Using Search Console Data

The video explains a Claude-based AI SEO system called the Goldie Demand Engine that connects a Google Workspace API to Google Search Console to analyze a portfolio of sites, identify top-performing keywords by website, and surface the best ranking and re-optimization opportunities based on real impressions and clicks. It shows how the workflow avoids manual keyword digging and replaces generic tools by using each site’s own Search Console data, then feeds recommended keywords into an Agent OS content pipeline where you add a relevant first-person case study, generate five articles, and automatically deploy them (including internal links) without logging into WordPress. The process is managed through an AI-powered Kanban and a dashboard running multiple agents, with examples of traffic growth and the ability to rank multiple times per keyword across sites, plus links to the AI Profit Boardroom system and SEO resources.

videos.title: 11.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
11.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Pac-12 preview reactions + could Brendan Sorsby & Texas Tech be the tipping point for CFB?
videos.summary_source_text:
Pac-12 preview reactions + could Brendan Sorsby & Texas Tech be the tipping point for CFB? Justin Michael begins the podcast by talking about Damon Washington in the latest edition of “Remember that Ram” before giving out the “CSU Stat of the Day” and a brief update on the latest commitments for CSU Football. He talks about Blaise Burwell choosing to be a two-sport athlete in Fort Collins and the significance of landing Todd Nordenson over Wyoming and multiple Pac-12 foes. Finally, Justin gets into Pac-12 projections from ESPN and Athlon. He gives his reactions to the national takes, plus talks about the questions he has for all of the teams going into 2026.

videos.title: 10.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
10.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Joe Sakic Confident In This Avalanche Team. Says Makar Will Play Entire Career With Franchise.
videos.summary_source_text:
Joe Sakic Confident In This Avalanche Team. Says Makar Will Play Entire Career With Franchise. Colorado Avalanche fans get major reassurance: Joe Sakic declares Cale Makar an “Avalanche for life.” With Makar’s contract extension talks already in motion, Sakic’s confidence in keeping this franchise defenseman squashes speculation and lifts concerns—are Avalanche supporters finally free from another Miko Rantanen-like saga?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson examine key takeaways from the Avalanche’s press conference, including Jared Bednar’s confirmed return, the coaching staff’s future, and the controversial decision to retain power play coach Dave Hakstol. The hosts dissect the team’s playoff shortcomings, debate the impact of aging stars like Nazem Kadri and Brock Nelson, and spotlight Gabe Landeskog’s remarkable comeback season. Plus, they break down the NHL’s Hart Trophy voting, questioning why Nathan MacKinnon and Colorado’s regular-season dominance weren’t reflected in awards season. Can this Avalanche core deliver another Stanley Cup—or is the window closing faster than expected?

Image Credit: Eric Bolte-USA TODAY Sports

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | RBC Canadian Open | Round 1 | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | RBC Canadian Open | Round 1 | 2026 Check out all the best shots from round 1 of the 2026 RBC Canadian Open, featuring Sahith Theegala, Brooks Koepka, Tony Finau and Tommy Fleetwood, among others.

The PGA TOUR returns north of the border this week for the RBC Canadian Open, one of the longest-running events on the schedule and the third-oldest championship on the PGA TOUR calendar. TPC Toronto at Osprey Valley’s North Course hosts the national open for the second consecutive year, welcoming one of the strongest fields in tournament history as players make their final preparations for the U.S. Open. Four of the world’s top 10 players are set to tee it up, led by Matt Fitzpatrick, Justin Rose, Tommy Fleetwood and Collin Morikawa, who returns to the event for the first time since 2019. Recent PGA Championship winner Aaron Rai is back in action, while Brooks Koepka makes his first RBC Canadian Open appearance since 2019. Viktor Hovland adds further intrigue in his tournament debut, joining a field that also includes Robert MacIntyre, Sam Burns, Shane Lowry, Wyndham Clark, Tony Finau and Max Homa. Defending champion Ryan Fox returns looking to become the first player since Jhonattan Vegas to successfully defend the title. Home hopes will once again be high, with Corey Conners, Taylor Pendrith, Mackenzie Hughes and rookie Sudarshan Yellamaraju leading a strong Canadian contingent. Mike Weir is also set for his 33rd appearance in Canada’s national championship. In addition to 500 FedExCup points, a place in next week’s U.S. Open is available for the leading player not already exempt, adding another layer of significance to an already stacked championship. With a world-class field and plenty at stake, the RBC Canadian Open is set for another memorable week at TPC Toronto.

videos.title: Sahith Theegala surges to lead with 6-under 64 | RBC Canadian Open | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Sahith Theegala surges to lead with 6-under 64 | RBC Canadian Open | 2026 In the opening round of the 2026 RBC Canadian Open, Sahith Theegala shoots a 6-under 64 to take a share of the lead with four others heading into Friday.

The PGA TOUR returns north of the border this week for the RBC Canadian Open, one of the longest-running events on the schedule and the third-oldest championship on the PGA TOUR calendar. TPC Toronto at Osprey Valley’s North Course hosts the national open for the second consecutive year, welcoming one of the strongest fields in tournament history as players make their final preparations for the U.S. Open. Four of the world’s top 10 players are set to tee it up, led by Matt Fitzpatrick, Justin Rose, Tommy Fleetwood and Collin Morikawa, who returns to the event for the first time since 2019. Recent PGA Championship winner Aaron Rai is back in action, while Brooks Koepka makes his first RBC Canadian Open appearance since 2019. Viktor Hovland adds further intrigue in his tournament debut, joining a field that also includes Robert MacIntyre, Sam Burns, Shane Lowry, Wyndham Clark, Tony Finau and Max Homa. Defending champion Ryan Fox returns looking to become the first player since Jhonattan Vegas to successfully defend the title. Home hopes will once again be high, with Corey Conners, Taylor Pendrith, Mackenzie Hughes and rookie Sudarshan Yellamaraju leading a strong Canadian contingent. Mike Weir is also set for his 33rd appearance in Canada’s national championship. In addition to 500 FedExCup points, a place in next week’s U.S. Open is available for the leading player not already exempt, adding another layer of significance to an already stacked championship. With a world-class field and plenty at stake, the RBC Canadian Open is set for another memorable week at TPC Toronto.

videos.title: The Fable 5 Backlash Is Getting Serious
videos.summary_source_text:
The Fable 5 Backlash Is Getting Serious Claude Fable 5 is already facing huge backlash, and the reason is bigger than simple safety filters. Users say Anthropic’s newest Claude model is refusing harmless prompts, triggering false alarms, and in some cases limiting advanced AI-related work in ways that were not clearly visible at first. Fable 5 may still be one of the most powerful public AI models ever released, but the controversy is now about trust: when Claude gives you an answer, are you getting the real Fable 5, a downgraded Opus fallback, or a weakened version shaped behind the scenes?

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@space.revolution

📌 What You’ll See:
The Register on Fable 5 blocking harmless prompts, including the “hello” example
SOURCE: https://www.theregister.com/ai-and-ml/2026/06/10/anthropic-claude-fable-5-refuses-innocuous-prompts/5253754
Business Insider on Anthropic admitting it made the wrong tradeoff with Fable 5 guardrails
SOURCE: https://www.businessinsider.com/anthropic-mythos-made-wrong-tradeoff-new-model-guardrails-llm-development-2026-6
The Verge on Anthropic apologizing for invisible Claude Fable guardrails
SOURCE: https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/948280/anthropic-claude-fable-invisible-distillation-guardrail
Anthropic’s official Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 announcement
SOURCE: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-fable-5-mythos-5
Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 system card
SOURCE: https://www-cdn.anthropic.com/d00db56fa754a1b115b6dd7cb2e3c342ee809620.pdf

🚨 Why It Matters
Claude Fable 5 shows a new problem in frontier AI. The most powerful models are no longer judged only by how smart they are, but by how much users can trust what they are getting. If a model can refuse harmless work, fall back to a weaker model, or limit certain answers behind the scenes, the real question becomes whether closed AI systems are becoming too controlled to fully trust.

videos.title: How Breathing Influences Your Nervous System
videos.summary_source_text:
How Breathing Influences Your Nervous System The body doesn't always know the difference between a real threat and a stressful thought. Modern life keeps many people in a constant state of tension, with elevated stress signals running throughout the day. The good news is that the nervous system can be influenced intentionally. Something as simple as slowing the breath and extending the exhale can activate the vagus nerve and help restore a healthier balance between stress and recovery. This is around 20 years ago I starting using the RESPeRATE device with my patients. You can learn more about it and receive a special discount by using the link in my linktree that is linked on my channel page.

videos.title: How To Fix Hockey Issues Faster
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Fix Hockey Issues Faster The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

Colorado Avalanche FULL End-of-Season Media Availability with Joe Sakic and Josh Kroenke Joe Sakic and Josh Kroenke address the media for end-of-season ability, discussing multiple topics surrounding the Colorado Avalanche. Sakic confirms that the whole coaching staff will return, and also remarks that the Avs are hoping to have Cale Makar signed by the end of the summer.

videos.title: How To Play Par-3s Smarter #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Play Par-3s Smarter #golfswing #golftips A lot of par-3 shots come up short before the swing even starts. When you tee the ball too high, you lose ball speed and don’t let the loft of the club do the work. Add in aiming straight at tucked pins and choosing clubs based on your best strike, and you’re setting yourself up for failure. In this video we show how better tee height, smarter targets, and realistic club choice lead to more greens hit.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. A lot of par-3 shots come up short before the swing even starts. videos.summary_source_text:
IF YOU CAN’T DO THIS, YOUR BODY MAY BE AGING FASTER THAN YOU THINK | Dr. Mandell Can a simple 30-second chair test reveal how well your body is aging? In this video, Dr. Mandell explains why the ability to stand up from a chair without using your hands is one of the most powerful indicators of lower body strength, balance, mobility, and long-term independence. Your glutes and leg muscles are essential for preventing falls, supporting your spine, improving posture, protecting your joints, and maintaining an active lifestyle as you age. The good news is that it's never too late to improve. Learn how this easy daily exercise can strengthen your body, build confidence, and help you stay healthier, stronger, and more independent for years to come. Small actions performed consistently can lead to life-changing results. Challenge yourself today and start investing in a stronger future.

videos.summary_source_text:
Llama 4 Explained: The 10M Token AI Meta Gave Away for Free Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Meta just dropped Llama 4 — and instead of locking it behind an API, they gave it away for free. In this video, I break down exactly what Llama 4 is, how the mixture-of-experts architecture works, what Scout, Maverick, and Behemoth actually do, and whether the 10 million token context window is as game-changing as it sounds.

We'll look at the real benchmark picture (including where Llama 4 still trails OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google), the licensing terms that make it free for commercial use, and whether open-source AI is genuinely closing the gap — or just closing in on the hype.

videos.title: GPT-5.5 Review: What OpenAI's "Super App" Model Actually Does
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-5.5 Review: What OpenAI's "Super App" Model Actually Does Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
OpenAI's GPT-5.5 — codenamed "Spud" — launched on April 23, 2026, and it's being positioned as a step toward what Greg Brockman calls an AI "super app." But how much of that is real, and how much is it just marketing dressed up as a product launch?

In this deep dive, I go through everything that actually matters about GPT-5.5: the technical specs under the hood, the benchmark results that prove (and disprove) OpenAI's claims, and the honest competitive picture against Claude Opus 4.7 and Gemini 3.1 Pro. No hype, no hand-waving — just what the model is genuinely good at, where it falls short, and how to actually get value out of it whether you're paying or on the free tier.

We cover the 1.05 million token context window, the new reasoning effort setting, the multimodal inputs most users still aren't touching, the Terminal-Bench 2.0 and Expert-SWE benchmark numbers, the fantasy creature reinforcement learning quirk that fast-tracked GPT-5.6, and the GPT-5.5 Instant rollout for free-tier ChatGPT users.

If you want an evidence-first read on whether GPT-5.5 is worth your time — and which model is actually right for your work — this is the breakdown.

⏱️ Chapters
00:00 The setting most users are missing
1:36 The backstory: how GPT-5.5 came to be
3:48 The technical specs: what's actually under the hood
6:48 The benchmark results: where GPT-5.5 actually wins
9:20 The competition: how it stacks up against Claude and Gemini
11:43 The use cases: what GPT-5.5 is actually built for
14:02 The versions and pricing: what you actually get
16:32 The verdict

🔔 Subscribe for skepticism-led AI coverage that separates real capability from vendor claims.

💬 Which GPT-5.5 feature are you most excited to actually use? Drop it in the comments.

videos.title: I Test Golf Clubs I Never Unboxed (CRAZY CLUBS!)
videos.summary_source_text:
I Test Golf Clubs I Never Unboxed (CRAZY CLUBS!) Rick has no idea what's inside these mystery golf club boxes... and neither do you. From brand-new releases to forgotten gems (and maybe a few disasters), every box contains a complete surprise. Which clubs will impress, and which belong straight back in the box? Let's find out.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

Your Slice Won’t Go Away Until You Fix This 🟠Swing Coach App🟠
FREE TRIAL ⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️
https://inf.getswingcoach.com/CHRY232

In this live lesson with Andy, we didn’t try to fix his downswing… and that’s exactly why it improved.

He was struggling with weak iron shots leaking out to the right, but the real issue wasn’t where most golfers would expect. Instead of chasing the downswing, we looked higher up the chain and made one simple backswing change that completely transformed his ball flight.

To help identify and reinforce the correct movement patterns, we also used the SwingCoach app during the session, giving instant feedback on what was happening in the swing.

The result was immediate: better contact, improved direction, and a much more powerful and consistent strike.

If you’re struggling with similar ball flight issues, this video will show you why fixing the right part of the swing matters more than working harder on the wrong one.

videos.title: Claude Fable 5 — What's Real, What's Marketing, and When It's Worth the Price
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Fable 5 — What's Real, What's Marketing, and When It's Worth the Price Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Every few weeks a lab ships a model, calls it "the most capable yet," and leaves you squinting at a benchmark chart wondering if anything changed. So I read Anthropic's launch post, the developer notes, and the fine print almost nobody reads. The real story behind Claude Fable 5 isn't a smarter model — it's that Anthropic just handed you a public cut of a tier it previously said was too risky to release.

This is the evidence-first breakdown: what Fable 5 (and its locked-down twin Mythos 5) actually is, where Anthropic's claims hold up, where they earn an asterisk, and exactly when Fable is worth the premium versus when you're better off on something cheaper.

⏱️ CHAPTERS
0:00 Intro
0:56 What Anthropic Actually Shipped

Every few weeks a lab ships a model, calls it "the most capable yet," and leaves you squinting at a benchmark chart wondering if anything changed. So I read Anthropic's launch post, the developer notes, and the fine print almost nobody reads. The real story behind Claude Fable 5 isn't a smarter model — it's that Anthropic just handed you a public cut of a tier it previously said was too risky to release.

This is the evidence-first breakdown: what Fable 5 (and its locked-down twin Mythos 5) actually is, where Anthropic's claims hold up, where they earn an asterisk, and exactly when Fable is worth the premium versus when you're better off on something cheaper.

videos.title: Gemini Spark Is Google’s Most Powerful AI Tool Yet
videos.summary_source_text:
Gemini Spark Is Google’s Most Powerful AI Tool Yet *Gemini at Work Guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/8f8u

Google just released Gemini Spark, a personal AI agent. In this video, I walk through how I use Google Gemini Spark to run AI tasks in the background, even when my laptop is off. Gemini Spark is a new AI agent inside the Gemini app, and it can work with Gmail, Google Drive, Google Sheets, Google Calendar, and more.

I show how Gemini Spark can scan my emails, read AI newsletters, find key ideas, and turn that research into content. I also show how I use Gemini Spark skills to match my writing style, so the AI can write more like me.

Then I go step by step through scheduled tasks. I show how Gemini Spark can check my inbox every week, send me a recap, update a Google Sheet, and create a Google Drive folder from a new email. I also test how it can look at my Google Calendar and build a meeting brief from my emails and Drive files.

This is still an early and experimental Google AI tool, so I also talk about privacy and why you should be careful with what you connect. Gemini Spark can be very useful, but it also needs access to a lot of your Google account.

This video is for anyone who wants to understand Gemini Spark, Google Gemini AI agents, AI automation, Gmail automation, Google Workspace automation, and how AI skills can make these tools more helpful. *Gemini at Work Guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/8f8u

videos.summary_source_text:
These 3 Nutrients Get Depleted When You're Stressed Stress doesn’t just affect your mind, it can quietly drain the nutrients your body depends on to stay calm, rested, and healthy. In this video, we’re breaking down the 3 key nutrients that stress burns through the fastest: magnesium, zinc, and vitamin B1. When these nutrients get depleted, you may notice symptoms like anxiety, insomnia, nervous tension, heart palpitations, mood changes, excessive worrying, muscle spasms, and even skin problems.

🌟10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/3RE0jUB

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

Learn why chronic stress increases your need for these essential nutrients and how deficiencies in magnesium, zinc, and B1 can impact your nervous system, sleep, hormones, and overall well-being.

videos.title: Why Your Legs Won’t Stop Moving at Night (Fix ASAP)
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Your Legs Won’t Stop Moving at Night (Fix ASAP) Do you have restless legs at night? Discover the underlying cause of restless leg syndrome, how to stop getting leg cramps at night, and how to fix the sleep problems caused by restless legs within 72 hours.

0:00 Restless legs at night
0:54 What causes restless legs syndrome? 
1:14 Dopamine and restless legs syndrome
1:56 Iron and nerve health 
2:30 Why you have restless legs at night 
3:13 Mineral deficiencies and restless legs syndrome
5:25 More restless legs syndrome causes
6:34 What causes the mineral deficiencies related to restless legs syndrome?
7:20 Restless legs relief 

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/3RUZk2J

Learn more about common nutrient deficiencies, what may be causing them, and how to correct them naturally: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/Uw21AZN7Ulc
▶️ https://youtu.be/7lSQ2hnycLg
▶️ https://youtu.be/89jwTIbWRuI

For a deeper look at restless legs syndrome and what may be causing it, check out this article: https://drbrg.co/4uonEHx

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Restless legs at night are often described as a buildup of energy in the thigh muscles that can make it difficult to relax and sleep.

Restless legs syndrome is not actually a problem with the legs; it’s a neurological issue involving the brain. Many people are treated with medications that affect dopamine, but these drugs may eventually stop working and often worsen the problem. 

Restless legs syndrome is often linked to low iron, but simply taking iron doesn’t usually solve the problem. Nerves need both iron and copper in the proper amounts, and iron cannot function correctly without copper.

Symptoms of restless legs syndrome tend to worsen at night because dopamine follows a circadian rhythm and reaches its lowest point during the evening. A subclinical dopamine deficiency can become much more noticeable at night. 

ATP is the critical fuel source for neurons, and ATP production depends on magnesium. Magnesium helps regulate calcium in the muscles by driving it out of muscle cells so they can relax. Without enough magnesium, muscles can remain tight.

Magnesium deficiency can contribute to restless legs, sleep problems, muscle cramps, and reduced ATP production in the nervous system.

Vitamin B1 is also essential for preventing restless legs at night. Vitamin B1 deficiency is associated with peripheral neuropathy, anxiety, nervous tension, and impaired dopamine production.

A high-carbohydrate diet can deplete copper, magnesium, and vitamin B1, potentially contributing to restless legs syndrome symptoms.

videos.title: Unpopular opinion: you don't need to ask ChatGPT everything
videos.summary_source_text:
Unpopular opinion: you don't need to ask ChatGPT everything This might be an unpopular opinion, but most people don't need to use cloud AI models for everything.

Most people are using the most state-of-the-art AI models from ChatGPT or Claude to summarize documents or write emails for them, and frankly these models have gotten too smart for that. You don't need all the compute for everyday tasks. 

Running local models directly on your computer means you don't need the internet, your data is completely private, and you're not at the whims of the big AI labs. 

With amazing new local models and even better hardware, your computer can handle 90% of the simple things we ask AI to do.

Would you switch to using a local AI model?

videos.title: Shocking New Toyota – I didn’t see this coming!
videos.summary_source_text:
Shocking New Toyota – I didn’t see this coming! Head to 16:13 to see Mat in the mid-engined car, and then later drive the first Celica prototype!

Mat’s teamed up with Toyota in Japan to get hands-on with the M Concept, attend a 24-hour endurance race with the Gazoo Racing team, and even have an exclusive look at the all-new Corolla GRMN!

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1106

Toyota insiders have dropped massive hints that the mid-engine M Concept prototype will likely spawn the next-generation Celica! It features a brand-new, mid-mounted 2.0-litre four-cylinder turbo with over 400hp, and unlike the previous generation of Celica, it’ll come with all-wheel drive! The concept has been developed under Gazoo Racing's ultimate philosophy of "test, break, fix, repeat," and Toyota is currently openly racing this unfinished prototype to push its limits. 

With that in mind, Mat’s joined the team on the grid at Fuji Speedway to witness the Gazoo Racing team testing the concept in a gruelling 24-hour endurance race. Alongside the M Concept, GR is racing a standard 1.6-litre GR Yaris to test biofuel, prototype braking systems, and advanced swan-neck aero packages! 

While at the track, Mat also catches up with Toyota's legendary chairman, Akio Toyoda. In a completely unscripted conversation, Akio explains why he chooses fun over corporate bureaucracy, his love for the smell and sound of real engines, and reveals that the cult-classic GR Yaris might have actually turned over a small profit!

Mat also had a chance to get hands-on with the newly unveiled Toyota Corolla GRMN, and there’s absolutely loads to love about it! Torque is up to 450Nm, the rear seats have been ripped out (shedding 30kg), and racing bucket seats have been added up front! It also has a carbon fibre bonnet and spoiler. Unfortunately, though, it’s not coming to the UK! 😢

Finally, Mat joins Toyota at the Shimoyama test facility to test drive the various concepts and prototypes. From a terrifying passenger lap in the 400hp M Concept to sliding a 1.6-litre mid-engine concept on a loose gravel rally stage, this video isn’t one you want to miss! 

The question is, who wants to see Toyota resurrect the Celica? Let us know in the comments! Head to 16:13 to see Mat in the mid-engined car, and then later drive the first Celica prototype!

It features a brand-new, mid-mounted 2.0-litre four-cylinder turbo with over 400hp, and unlike the previous generation of Celica, it’ll come with all-wheel drive! The concept has been developed under Gazoo Racing's ultimate philosophy of "test, break, fix, repeat," and Toyota is currently openly racing this unfinished prototype to push its limits. 

With that in mind, Mat’s joined the team on the grid at Fuji Speedway to witness the Gazoo Racing team testing the concept in a gruelling 24-hour endurance race. Alongside the M Concept, GR is racing a standard 1.6-litre GR Yaris to test biofuel, prototype braking systems, and advanced swan-neck aero packages! 

While at the track, Mat also catches up with Toyota's legendary chairman, Akio Toyoda. In a completely unscripted conversation, Akio explains why he chooses fun over corporate bureaucracy, his love for the smell and sound of real engines, and reveals that the cult-classic GR Yaris might have actually turned over a small profit!

Mat also had a chance to get hands-on with the newly unveiled Toyota Corolla GRMN, and there’s absolutely loads to love about it! Torque is up to 450Nm, the rear seats have been ripped out (shedding 30kg), and racing bucket seats have been added up front! It also has a carbon fibre bonnet and spoiler. Unfortunately, though, it’s not coming to the UK! 😢

Finally, Mat joins Toyota at the Shimoyama test facility to test drive the various concepts and prototypes. From a terrifying passenger lap in the 400hp M Concept to sliding a 1.6-litre mid-engine concept on a loose gravel rally stage, this video isn’t one you want to miss! 

The question is, who wants to see Toyota resurrect the Celica? Let us know in the comments!
videos.summary: Shocking New Toyota – I didn’t see this coming. Head to 16:13 to see Mat in the mid-engined car, and then later drive the first Celica prototype.

If you're a high handicap golfer struggling with thin iron shots, no divot, and no compression — this is your problem too. In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno shows exactly why the fix isn't at impact. It starts with the takeaway. Billy's club was getting too far low and inside due to a lack of vertical wrist hinge. Eric walks through the exact golf drills used to fix Billy's golf swing, improve his swing plane, and get him compressing the golf ball. These are practical golf tips any high handicap golfer can apply to start hitting better iron shots and learn how to play golf at a higher level.

What You'll Learn:
• Why a lack of vertical wrist hinge causes an under-plane takeaway and poor iron contact
• How to use the Swing Coach App to identify golf swing problems in real time
• How to increase wrist hinge progressively during the backswing for better compression
• The butt-of-club and shaft-parallel checkpoint for correct early hinge
• The thud the mat drill for consistent ground interaction and divots
• How the 3:00 and 2:00 station golf drill keeps the club on plane through the takeaway and downswing
• Why high handicap golfers who are too far inside must exaggerate to find neutral swing plane
• How handle position at setup pre-sets swing plane and wrist hinge
• How to compress the golf ball and stop hitting thin iron shots for good
