videos.title: Larkin, Babcock, and the Cup Final | GS Off Ice SPECIAL Off Season Edition
videos.summary_source_text:
Larkin, Babcock, and the Cup Final | GS Off Ice SPECIAL Off Season Edition The Stanley Cup Final is four games deep, and we're breaking down everything we've seen from the series so far, including our updated predictions, biggest surprises, and whether momentum has shifted heading into the final stretch. We also dive into the latest Dylan Larkin trade rumors, with reports linking the Red Wings captain to Florida, Minnesota, and Vegas. Which destination makes the most sense, which teams need him the most, and what could Detroit realistically expect in return for a player with four years remaining on his contract?

We also discuss the Edmonton Oilers' decision to hire Mike Babcock as their next head coach, whether coaching was truly the team's biggest issue, and what Babcock brings to the table that Kris Knoblauch didn't. Plus, we react to the latest NHL Awards, including the Jack Adams, Norris, Ted Lindsay, and Vezina Trophy winners, before making our own predictions for who will take home the Hart Trophy.

In this week's Money Moves segment, we examine the Minnesota Wild's six-year extension for Michael McCarron and what it means for their salary cap situation moving forward, as well as Evgeni Malkin's new one-year deal to remain in Pittsburgh. Would we have made the same decisions if we were running those organizations?

Finally, we continue our offseason Team In Review series with the Vancouver Canucks, Chicago Blackhawks, and Calgary Flames, identifying the biggest priorities each franchise must address this summer. We wrap things up with another edition of Flaming Hot Takes, where we each bring two bold NHL predictions and put them to the test.

videos.title: HOME SWEET HOME! Carolina Hurricanes Seeking to Take 3-2 Series Lead Back Home in Game 5
videos.summary_source_text:
HOME SWEET HOME! Carolina Hurricanes Seeking to Take 3-2 Series Lead Back Home in Game 5 The Carolina Hurricanes are seeking to take a 3-2 series lead after Thursday night's Game 5. What are the big storylines heading into Game 5 back in Raleigh as the Hurricanes look to take their first lead of the Stanley Cup Final? Who needs to step up, and who should we watch from the Hurricanes to continue their impact? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the goalie situation once again, but this time for Game 5. While Rod Brind'Amour stated that they wanted to give Frederik Andersen more rest to be ready as their possible starter, should they go back to Brandon Bussi? After his performance in Game 4, does it make sense to hop back on the Bus, or go with the goalie that got them to the Stanley Cup Final? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how the depth once again will need to be relied on for Game 5, just like the rest of the series. How can the Hurricanes benefit once again with depth scoring, and how do they need a full team effort? Finally, Zach concludes the show by picking his Canes to Click, of who will score for the Hurricanes in Game 5. Also, who are the players to watch? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Wernbloom får exklusiv inblick i Örebro SK
videos.summary_source_text:
Wernbloom får exklusiv inblick i Örebro SK Wernblooms Eskapader har kommit till Örebro SK. Pontus får en rundtur av hemmasonen Ahmed Yasin, tittar på träningen och hänger i stan med Alexander Axén, får en pratstund med huvudtränare Rikard Norling och lär sig måla av Jacob Ouro Ortmark.

videos.title: Texas Stars Captain Curtis McKenzie IS Returning For His 14th Season | DLLS Stars Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Texas Stars Captain Curtis McKenzie IS Returning For His 14th Season | DLLS Stars Podcast Take advantage of our Playoff Diehard Sale and join our community today! https://alldlls.com/stars-playoff-offer-youtube 

Former Dallas Star and current Texas Stars captain Curtis McKenzie joins the show today! We will talk to Curtis about his decision to sign another one-year American Hockey League contract with Texas, returning for his 14th professional season, his 11th with the Stars organization. McKenzie was drafted by Dallas in the sixth round of the 2009 NHL Entry Draft and has appeared in 99 career NHL games, all with the Stars, along with 725 career AHL games and has over 500 career AHL points. He also won the 2014 Calder Cup with Texas during his rookie season, where he won the 2013-14 Dudley “Red” Garrett Memorial Award as the AHL’s Most Outstanding Rookie. We will also get a What The Puck breakdown from Lud on last night’s Stanley Cup Final Game 4, as Carolina won 5-3 to even the series at 2-2 and touch on some NHL News & Notes, time permitting.

videos.title: Revisiting The Texas Rangers’ Offseason Moves As Gore Faces Royals Wednesday | DLLS Rangers Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Revisiting The Texas Rangers’ Offseason Moves As Gore Faces Royals Wednesday | DLLS Rangers Podcast Take advantage of our Playoff Diehard Sale and join our community today! https://alldlls.com/stars-playoff-offer-youtube 

An ALLCITY Network Production

The Texas Rangers made two big splashes in the offseason, first with trading Marcus Semien for Brandon Nimmo and later sending five prospects to the Nationals for left-hander MacKenzie Gore. Nimmo has been fine, better than his numbers show, but Gore has been up and down and in some fans’ crosshairs. We will look back at all of the Rangers’ offseason moves, but take a deeper look at Gore as he prepares to face Kansas City on Tuesday night. We’ll also take a look at the Vandy Boys, Kumar Rocker and Jack Leiter.

videos.title: 10.06.26 Ep.13- The Liquidity Illusion | Why Markets Move Against Retail Before the Real Move Begins
videos.summary_source_text:
10.06.26 Ep.13- The Liquidity Illusion | Why Markets Move Against Retail Before the Real Move Begins Welcome to Episode 13 of RIFT Before You Quit.

In this episode, we explore one of the most misunderstood concepts in trading and financial markets:

Liquidity.

Most retail traders believe markets move because of charts, indicators, news events, or technical patterns. Professional traders, institutions, hedge funds, and market makers understand something different:

Markets move toward liquidity first.

Before major moves occur, the market often seeks out stop losses, liquidation clusters, emotional positioning, and areas where retail traders are most vulnerable.

This creates what many traders experience as:

- Stop-loss hunts
- False breakouts
- Fake breakdowns
- Liquidity sweeps
- Emotional shakeouts
- Sudden reversals

The result?

Many traders get forced out of positions moments before the market moves in the direction they originally expected.

In Episode 13 we break down:

✅ What liquidity really means

✅ Why institutions focus on liquidity instead of charts

✅ How stop-loss clusters attract price movement

✅ Why markets often move toward pain before opportunity

✅ The psychology behind retail liquidation

✅ How professional capital accesses liquidity

✅ The mechanics of liquidity sweeps and false breakouts

✅ Why emotional traders become liquidity for larger players

✅ How smart money positions before major market moves

✅ Why understanding liquidity changes the way you trade forever

Key Concepts Covered
The Liquidity Illusion

Retail traders often think liquidity simply means buying and selling volume.

Professional traders understand liquidity differently.

Liquidity exists where:

- Stop losses are clustered
- Liquidation levels accumulate
- Emotional positioning is concentrated
- Large pools of orders exist

Large capital cannot enter or exit efficiently without counterparties.

This means institutions frequently seek liquidity before initiating major directional moves.

Why Markets Move Against Retail

One of the harshest realities in trading is:

The market doesn't care where retail wants price to go.

Instead, price often moves toward areas where:

- Retail traders are overleveraged
- Stop losses are concentrated
- Liquidation clusters exist
- Emotional reactions are predictable

Understanding this concept helps explain why so many traders experience:

- Getting stopped out before a rally
- Liquidation before a reversal
- Perfect entries that somehow fail
- Stop Hunts & Liquidity Sweeps

We examine real-world examples of how markets frequently:

- Build obvious support or resistance
- Encourage retail participation
- Trigger stop losses
- Sweep liquidity
- Reverse direction

To retail traders this feels like manipulation.

To institutions, it is simply accessing liquidity.

Smart Money vs Retail Thinking

Retail traders often focus on:

- Predictions
- Indicators
- Emotions
- Market opinions

Smart money focuses on:

- Risk management
- Capital preservation
- Liquidity access
- Positioning
- Portfolio construction

This difference explains why professional capital survives while most retail traders eventually struggle.

The Future of Smart Money on RIFT

This episode also introduces deeper concepts behind the upcoming Smart Money infrastructure inside RIFT.

You'll gain insight into:

* Managed portfolios
* Managed risk
* Managed execution
* Capital allocation systems
* Intelligent trade management
* Liquidity-based positioning

As RIFT continues evolving, traders will increasingly gain access to tools and infrastructure that mirror professional capital management principles.

What You'll Learn

By the end of this episode you'll understand:

✔ Why markets often move against the crowd

✔ Why liquidity matters more than most indicators

✔ How institutions think differently

✔ Why stop losses are frequently targeted

✔ How retail traders unintentionally provide liquidity

✔ How professional systems position around emotional market behavior

✔ Why future trading infrastructure is becoming smarter, faster, and more systematic

Featured Topics
Liquidity Illusion
Liquidity Sweeps
Stop-Loss Hunting
False Breakouts
Institutional Positioning
Smart Money Concepts
Market Maker Behavior
Retail Psychology
Emotional Trading Traps
High-Frequency Participation
Copy Trading Infrastructure
Future Trading Technology
Professional Risk Management
Capital Allocation Systems
RIFT Smart Money

The market rarely rewards emotion.

The market rewards structure.

The market rewards discipline.

And most importantly:

The market rewards those who understand where liquidity lives.

Watch Episode 13 and discover why markets often move toward pain first… and opportunity second. Welcome to Episode 13 of RIFT Before You Quit.

videos.title: Skatterna och valet - Moderaternas Marie Nicholson
videos.summary_source_text:
Skatterna och valet - Moderaternas Marie Nicholson Moderaterna vill sänka tillväxthämmande skatter och stärka företagandet 

Sjätte intervjun i serien är med Moderaternas skattepolitiska talesperson Marie Nicholson, som intervjuas av PwC:s skatteexpert Ulrika Lundh Eriksson. I fokus står sänkning av tillväxthämmande skatter för att stärka företagande och konkurrenskraft. 

Marie Nicholson lyfter att Moderaterna vill sänka skatt på arbete och företagande, sänka bolagsskatten, på sikt till en av de lägsta i EU samt sänka energiskatterna. Partiet har tillväxt för ögonen och vill ha en skattemix som ger mer pengar i plånboken och möjlighet för företag att växa. Moderaterna säger nej till fastighetsskatt, arvs- och gåvoskatt samt förmögenhetsskatt. Moderaterna vill sänka tillväxthämmande skatter och stärka företagandet

videos.title: Hindi - 10.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 10.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: The Avalanche Are Still the Class of the Central, But Could We See The Division Get Shaken Up?
videos.summary_source_text:
The Avalanche Are Still the Class of the Central, But Could We See The Division Get Shaken Up? Colorado Avalanche set the bar high with early Central Division predictions—will their rivals keep up or shake the standings with bold offseason moves? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson debate the fates of the Dallas Stars, Minnesota Wild, Winnipeg Jets, Nashville Predators, and more, breaking down salary cap crunches, standout talents like Connor Bedard and Clayton Keller, and the real impact of upcoming trades and free agent signings.

Key topics cover the Avalanche’s staying power in the Central, whether Chicago Blackhawks or St. Louis Blues remain at rock bottom, and which teams—like Utah and Dallas—could surprise or disappoint. The hosts assess the challenges Dallas faces retaining Jason Robertson, Nashville’s upside with Chris McFarland steering the ship, and Minnesota’s path to the top two. Plus, an honest review of Joel Kiviranta’s season spotlights the balance between depth and production.

videos.title: Claude Fable 5: Mythos AI Goes Public
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Fable 5: Mythos AI Goes Public Want the full playbook? Join the Creator Magic community 👉 https://mrc.fm/premium

Claude Fable 5 is the closest you can get to Anthropic's locked Mythos 5... and I've been running it. Same core model, public safety rails, and it genuinely thinks like a senior engineer.

In this one I put it to work on real builds. End to end coding, system design, and debugging the stuff that normally eats my whole day. It plans, verifies, and refines on its own, holds a million token context, and keeps going for days without me babysitting it.

I'll walk you through the exact workflows, the API setup, and the agent patterns I use to get an unfair edge as a solo builder.

videos.title: Hockey Blade Profile Preservation:  Elite vs the Competition
videos.summary_source_text:
Hockey Blade Profile Preservation:  Elite vs the Competition In this video, Chase with IW sits down with JP and Brian at Elite Blade Performance Technology to explain how Elite sharpening machines preserve the geometry of your skate blades with precision accuracy every time. While manual hand sharpening machines and other automated systems can gradually alter a custom profile, Elite's teaching pass maps the shape of the blade before sharpening and removes a consistent amount of steel from the heel, toe, and center.

Preserving that profile helps players maintain the speed, balance, and smooth turning performance they expect every time they step onto the ice.

In this video, we cover:
✅ Why preserving your custom blade profile is so important
✅ How Elite's teaching pass maps the blade before every sharpening
✅ How Elite removes a consistent amount of steel across the heel, toe, and center
✅ Why manual sharpening and other automated systems can gradually change blade geometry
✅ The performance issues caused by reverse-smile deformation and banana blades
✅ How to inspect your runners at home and recognize when it may be time for new steel

videos.title: Kaprizov Uses This Move 14 Times To Dominate The Entire Shift
videos.summary_source_text:
Kaprizov Uses This Move 14 Times To Dominate The Entire Shift The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: This NEW Driver Test Revealed A LOT MORE Than I Thought...
videos.summary_source_text:
This NEW Driver Test Revealed A LOT MORE Than I Thought... In this video, I put some of the most popular golf drivers through a test that every golfer should see. If you're searching for the most forgiving driver, the best driver of 2026, or simply want more distance and consistency off the tee, the results may surprise you.

Too often golfers choose a driver based on marketing, tour usage, or launch monitor numbers alone. This test reveals what really matters when it comes to forgiveness, accuracy, dispersion, and real-world performance on the golf course.

Which driver is the most forgiving? Which driver performs best under pressure? And is the latest technology actually making golfers better?

Watch until the end to see the full results and find out which driver came out on top.

videos.title: DON’T GO TO YOUR NEXT DOCTOR’S APPOINTMENT UNTIL YOU WATCH THIS | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
DON’T GO TO YOUR NEXT DOCTOR’S APPOINTMENT UNTIL YOU WATCH THIS | Dr. Mandell If you’re over 50, your next doctor’s appointment could be one of the most important opportunities to take control of your health—but only if you know the right questions to ask and how to prepare. In this video, I’ll share practical strategies to help you get the most value from every visit, including understanding your blood work, reviewing medications and supplements, discussing muscle health, balance, sleep, memory, and preventive care, and learning how to become an active participant in your own healthcare. Too often, people leave their appointments without the information they truly need to make better decisions about their future health. By asking thoughtful questions and understanding what really matters, you can work with your doctor to build a personalized plan that supports healthy aging, longevity, strength, independence, and a better quality of life. Whether you’re preparing for your annual physical or a routine follow-up, these simple steps can help you leave your appointment feeling informed, empowered, and ready to take charge of your health.

videos.title: When to Tight Turn and When to Punch Turn?
videos.summary_source_text:
When to Tight Turn and When to Punch Turn? Most people don't realize there are two completely different turns in hockey, and using the wrong one is what caps your speed without you ever knowing why.

The first is the tight turn. You reach for it when there's no room to cross but you still need to hold your speed through the corner. The second is the punch turn, and it does the opposite job. You use it when you want to scrub speed and cut even tighter to shake your opponent trying to check or strip the puck off of you.

Here's the part almost no one gets taught. These aren't the same skill at two settings. They're two separate tools for two different situations, and most players only ever own one of them with the punch never being used in games when it absolutely can be the difference between generating a scoring chance and not.

That's the gap between the NHL's best and everyone else. They have access to both and are so comfortable doing the mechanic from getting enough reps in training they show up automatically come game time when they need them most. 
Does the punch come automatic to you come game time? Forehand and backside side?

videos.title: Google AI Mode: The Future of Search… or Just Hype?
videos.summary_source_text:
Google AI Mode: The Future of Search… or Just Hype? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Google quietly changed how Search works — and most people are still using it the old way. After weeks inside Google AI Mode, here's what's genuinely new, what's powering it, where it beats traditional search, and where it still falls apart.

Powered by Gemini 3 and the newer Gemini 3 Flash, AI Mode brings conversational follow-ups, multimodal input (voice, image, file), and Deep Search to a tool billions already use. But it's not all smooth — there are processing bugs, source-diversity questions, and a real publisher/privacy backlash (DuckDuckGo's "No AI" traffic tripled for a reason). This is the evidence-first breakdown of what's hype and what actually matters.
Drop a comment with where you land — love it, hate it, or still on the fence.

CHAPTERS
00:00 — What Google AI Mode Actually Is
1:08 — The Origin Story
2:42 — The Technology Behind It
4:19 — The Competitive Landscape
6:03 — The Real-World Experience
7:36 — The Verdict

videos.title: Claude Fable 5 vs Mythos 5: The Model Anthropic Locked Away
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Fable 5 vs Mythos 5: The Model Anthropic Locked Away Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Anthropic just shipped two near-identically named frontier models — Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 — and the marketing barely explains the difference. One you can use today. The other is gated behind Project Glasswing and reserved for vetted partners. Same underlying model, two deployment modes, very different rules.
In this video I cut through the launch-day noise: what Anthropic actually released, what the independent benchmarks say versus the press release, why there are two versions, what it costs, who can access it, how to actually get value out of it as a builder — and the honest answer to whether this is AGI. No hype, just the evidence.
Topics covered

What Fable 5 and Mythos 5 actually are (and why they're the same model)
CursorBench 3.1 results — 72.9% vs Opus 4.8, Opus 4.7, GPT-5.5
Databricks OfficeQA Pro — the speed and token-cost trade-off
Project Glasswing, the UK AISI cyber evaluation, and the bio-research angle
Pricing breakdown: $10 / $50 per million tokens vs Opus 4.8
How to actually deploy Fable 5 — effort levels, boundaries, verification
Is this AGI? The honest read

Chapters
00:00 The two-model problem nobody's explaining
01:06 What Anthropic actually launched
02:42 What it can do — and what the benchmarks actually show
04:56 The cost of all that autonomy
06:44 Why there are two versions — the safety story
08:32 Pricing and access
09:54 Getting the most out of it
10:45 So — is it AGI?
12:34 The takeaway

videos.summary_source_text:
I Let Claude Fable AI ACTUALLY Trade REAL Money For Me | INSANE Results 🚀 I Let Claude Fable AI ACTUALLY Trade REAL Money For Me | INSANE Results

Claude Fable 5 just dropped.

The benchmarks look insane.

But benchmarks don’t matter unless the model can actually do something useful.

So I decided to test it properly.

Not with theory.
Not with hype.
Not with fake screenshots.

I wanted to know three things:

1. Can Claude Fable 5 build a profitable TradingView strategy with no tools?
2. Can it use backtesting tools to improve and optimize that strategy?
3. Can it scan the market, take trades, monitor them, and manage the result?

So I gave Claude access to my AI trading workflow, my TradingView backtesting tools, my free Trader Dev MCP server, and my StrategyFactory skill.

Then I let it build strategies, backtest them, optimize them, and run a live AI trading test.

Some of it worked better than I expected.

Some of it didn’t.

But one thing genuinely surprised me…

Claude started monitoring its own trades and making decisions by itself.

👉 Access all of my trading bots: https://strategyfactory.ai/
🔥 FREE WORKBOOKS: https://app.strategyfactory.ai/resources/

---

videos.title: Claude Fable 5 & Mythos 5: So Powerful Anthropic Won't Let It Answer Everything
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Fable 5 & Mythos 5: So Powerful Anthropic Won't Let It Answer Everything Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
You've sat through a dozen "most powerful model ever" launches by now — so when Anthropic shipped Claude Fable 5 and called it a Mythos-class model "made safe for the public," the easy reaction was: sure, marketing. Then the docs told a stranger story. This is a model so capable Anthropic had to build a system to stop it from answering certain questions — and that refusal is now a normal part of the product.

No hype, just the breakdown. We cover what Fable 5 and Mythos 5 actually are (and why one model got two names), how it holds up once you separate Anthropic's own demos from independent benchmarks, the new refusal-and-fallback behavior baked into the API, how to actually prompt it well, the price reality, the enterprise data-retention dealbreaker, and the question everyone asks in the comments: is this AGI?

CHAPTERS
00:00 The Strangest Part of This Launch
1:18 Fable vs. Mythos: The Same Brain, Two Doors
2:25 Why Anthropic Says This One Is Different
3:05 The Demos: Impressive, But They Picked Them
4:08 The Independent Numbers
5:22 The Catch: Refusal Is Now a Feature, Not a Bug
6:35 How to Actually Use It Well
8:00 Deployment, and the Enterprise Dealbreaker
8:55 The Price Tag
9:38 The Science Claims, Where It Gets a Little Unsettling
10:38 So... Is This AGI?
12:03 The Verdict

videos.summary_source_text:
LOW HANDS | Your Hands Are The Secret To A GREAT Golf Swing #shorts #golf #golfer #ericcogorno #shorts 

In this video, Eric Cogorno demonstrates how to keep the hands low in the golf swing during the takeaway and downswing for incredible benefits! This simple technique helps you stay in posture in golf swing, keeps your left arm straight, and delivers better ball striking like PGA Tour Pros Nelly Korda and Adam Scott.

Keeping your hands low in the golf swing helps you stay in posture and keep your lead arm straighter. Watch how PGA Tour Pros Nelly Korda and Adam Scott execute perfect takeaway mechanics keeping their hands below the belt line and the club up. This method will help you to stop standing up in the golf swing and help you  play better golf with more consistent contact.

What You'll Learn:
• The "hands low, club up" mantra that transformed a student's ball striking
• Why keeping the hands low in golf swing helps golfers maintain proper golf posture
• How PGA Tour Pros Nelly Korda and Adam Scott position their hands during the takeaway and downswing
• How to keep the left shoulder down for consistent ball striking
• How to stay in posture in golf swing without thinking about it
• How to stop standing up in the golf swing by keeping the hands low in the golf swing
• Why low hands keep your lead arm straighter automatically
• Simple adjustments that help you how to play better golf

videos.title: GitHub Just Made a Big AI Coding Move
videos.summary_source_text:
GitHub Just Made a Big AI Coding Move This new feature just changed the game for GitHub Copilot. 

The new GitHub Copilot app lets you choose literally ANY model provider out there, unlike using a coding app like Codex where you're locked in to only OpenAI models. 

This was such an exciting update for me I went to download the app the moment I got home. And, well... it wouldn't let me download it 😭

I haven't checked since I made this video, but hopefully it's available now!

videos.summary_source_text:
CHICLETS vs THE CHAMPS - Jon Gruden, Pat Maroon & Ryan McDonagh - Sandbagger Scramble It’s Chiclets vs Champs in the latest Sandbagger Scramble featuring Super Bowl Champion Jon Gruden and Stanley Cup champions Pat Maroon & Ryan McDonagh. videos.summary_source_text:
Why You Keep Trying to Relax — But Your Body Won’t Let Go If you keep trying to relax your body but nothing seems to change, this video is for you.

Many people think tension means something is wrong and that they need to try harder to release it. But often, tightness is not a failure. It can be a learned protective response.

In this video, I share a gentler way to understand why your body may not be “letting go” — and how real ease begins through awareness, not force.

If this resonates with you and you want to go deeper into this work, you can learn more here: https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

The Best and Worst Forms of Magnesium (Most People Get This Wrong) Not all magnesium is created equal, and taking the wrong type could be a complete waste of time and money.

🌟10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4vHOADq

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

In this video, we break down the best and worst forms of magnesium, including which ones are poorly absorbed and which ones your body can actually use.

Some forms of magnesium have extremely low absorption rates, meaning most of it passes right through your body. Others are far more bioavailable and can support sleep, relaxation, muscle recovery, energy, and even stress.

Watch until the end to discover which form stands out above the rest.

The BEST driver under £150 😳⛳️ Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: STAALING THE MOMENTUM! Carolina Hurricanes Bounce Back in Game 4 to Even Up the Stanley Cup Final
videos.summary_source_text:
STAALING THE MOMENTUM! Carolina Hurricanes Bounce Back in Game 4 to Even Up the Stanley Cup Final The Carolina Hurricanes won Game 4, 5-3, to even up the Stanley Cup Final at two games apiece. Who stood out, what stood out, and what are the big storylines as the series shifts back to Raleigh for Game 5? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes' 5-3 win on Tuesday night to even the Stanley Cup Final at 2-2. Jordan Staal had himself a night, scoring two goals in the process. How huge has the Captain been this series, setting milestones in the process? Secondly, how huge was Brandon Bussi to come in after almost not playing for two months, start his first postseason game, and get the win? He's been stellar all season, and now he's won a Stanley Cup Final game. Lastly, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes did overall in Game 4 as it sets up for Game 5 on Thursday. Are the Hurricanes in a good spot with the series heading back to Raleigh? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Unboxing IFRS 18 – Valutakursdifferenser
videos.summary_source_text:
Unboxing IFRS 18 – Valutakursdifferenser Var i resultaträkningen ska valutakursdifferenserna hamna – och varför är svaret inte alltid självklart?

IFRS 18 innebär nya kategorier med tydliga definitioner i resultaträkningen och med det försvinner det traditionella finansnettot. Det innebär att valutakursdifferenser, som tidigare till stor del redovisades i finansnettot, nu behöver analyseras och hänföras till rätt kategori. Grundregeln låter enkel, men i praktiken uppstår snabbt frågor: Var redovisas valutakursdifferenserna när övriga intäkter och kostnader för en post hamnar i flera kategorier? Hur hanterar man leasingskulder i utländsk valuta? Och inte minst – hur klassificerar man valutakursdifferenser på koncerninterna lån när övriga hänförliga intäkter och kostnader eliminerats i koncernredovisningen?

I det här avsnittet djupdyker vi i just dessa frågor tillsammans med Lisa Sagström och Johanna Strahl, redovisningsspecialister på PwC med fokus på IFRS och finansiell rapportering. Tillsammans med moderator Mian Heldesten, rådgivare inom finansiell rapportering, resonerar vi kring både regelverket och de praktiska utmaningar som många bolag står inför i samband med implementeringen av IFRS 18.

Detta är det andra avsnittet i vår LinkedIn Live-serie Unboxing IFRS 18, där vi löpande gör kortare nedslag i den nya standarden tillsammans med olika gäster som delar sina perspektiv och praktiska erfarenheter. IFRS 18 Presentation och upplysningar i finansiella rapporter ersätter IAS 1 Utformning av finansiella rapporter och ska tillämpas för räkenskapsår som börjar 1 januari 2027 eller senare, inklusive jämförelseinformation. Det innebär att vi redan nu befinner oss i jämförelseperioden som ska inkluderas i kvartalsrapporter och årsredovisning avseende 2027. Oavsett om du just börjat bekanta dig med standarden eller är mitt i implementeringen får du med dig värdefulla insikter och konkreta takeaways.

Här finns även del 1, Unboxing IFRS 18 – En introduktion: https://youtu.be/zcyRGyFW_To Var i resultaträkningen ska valutakursdifferenserna hamna – och varför är svaret inte alltid självklart?

Hur hanterar man leasingskulder i utländsk valuta? Och inte minst – hur klassificerar man valutakursdifferenser på koncerninterna lån när övriga hänförliga intäkter och kostnader eliminerats i koncernredovisningen?

I det här avsnittet djupdyker vi i just dessa frågor tillsammans med Lisa Sagström och Johanna Strahl, redovisningsspecialister på PwC med fokus på IFRS och finansiell rapportering. Tillsammans med moderator Mian Heldesten, rådgivare inom finansiell rapportering, resonerar vi kring både regelverket och de praktiska utmaningar som många bolag står inför i samband med implementeringen av IFRS 18.

Detta är det andra avsnittet i vår LinkedIn Live-serie Unboxing IFRS 18, där vi löpande gör kortare nedslag i den nya standarden tillsammans med olika gäster som delar sina perspektiv och praktiska erfarenheter. IFRS 18 Presentation och upplysningar i finansiella rapporter ersätter IAS 1 Utformning av finansiella rapporter och ska tillämpas för räkenskapsår som börjar 1 januari 2027 eller senare, inklusive jämförelseinformation. Det innebär att vi redan nu befinner oss i jämförelseperioden som ska inkluderas i kvartalsrapporter och årsredovisning avseende 2027. videos.title: 09.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
09.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: 9.6: In Danish: Ehlers leads Hurricanes to CRUCIAL Game 4 victory 🇩🇰⭐
videos.summary_source_text:
9.6: In Danish: Ehlers leads Hurricanes to CRUCIAL Game 4 victory 🇩🇰⭐ What a night for Nikolaj Ehlers and the Carolina Hurricanes! Carolina's Danish star tallies 3 points against Vegas - assisting on goals from Jackson Blake and Jordan Staal before putting the game out of reach with a sensational empty net goal. Ehlers' impressive offensive performance earns him both 2nd star of the game and Top European Player of the Night honors! Listen to the Danish-language broadcast call all of Ehlers' offensive contributions here!

videos.title: Hindi 09.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi 09.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Gabriel Landeskog Wins the Mark Messier AND Bill Masterton Awards
videos.summary_source_text:
Gabriel Landeskog Wins the Mark Messier AND Bill Masterton Awards Colorado Avalanche captain Gabriel Landeskog captures both the Mark Messier Leadership Award and the Bill Masterton Trophy, capping a remarkable return after three seasons away. Can any player rival his perseverance on and off the ice? Hosts Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down Landeskog’s journey, the unique NHL award presentation, and what these honors mean for his legacy in Denver.

The show also features an in-depth season grade for Parker Kelly, celebrating his surprising offensive breakout and physical impact. Plus, the hosts launch a lighthearted new segment—sharing genuinely nice takes on the Nashville Predators, from future roster potential to their electric game-night atmosphere. Insightful stats, fan reactions, and key moments make this a can't-miss episode for Avalanche—and NHL—fans chasing the sport’s best stories and personalities.

videos.title: Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying
videos.summary_source_text:
Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying Anthropic just released Claude Fable 5, its first publicly available Mythos-class AI model, and the whole launch feels different. Fable 5 is described as extremely powerful in software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity-related tasks, but Anthropic also built safety systems that limit its full capabilities in high-risk areas like cybersecurity, biology, chemistry, and distillation. This is the strange new reality of AI: companies are now releasing models so powerful that they also need separate systems to stop them from answering certain questions.

videos.summary_source_text:
Build This Station to Shallow the Club  #golfswing #golftips A lot of golfers try to shallow the club, but overthinking the move often makes their ball striking worse. This simple practice station helps you feel the correct shallowing motion without adding extra compensation or losing your low point. By training the right path and face relationship, you can shallow the club and still strike the ball cleanly. Use this station on the range or indoors to build a repeatable, reliable move.

videos.title: Claude Fable 5 is here: Anthropic just took a giant lead
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Fable 5 is here: Anthropic just took a giant lead *Free Claude Code Guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/x4eh

I test Claude Fable 5 to see if it is really better than Opus 4.8 and worth the higher cost.
Here is the official Claude Mythos 5 / Fable 5 post: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-fable-5-mythos-5

Claude just released two new models: Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5. I walk through what makes them different, who can use each one, and why Mythos 5 is still locked down.

I also test Claude Fable 5 inside Claude and Claude Design. I use it for slides, coding demos, interactive projects, and prompt tests so you can see how it performs in real use.

I compare Claude Fable 5 with Opus 4.8 on a Sim City style game, an AI history timeline, a solar system demo, and an ecosystem simulator. Some results are much better with Fable 5. Some are closer than I expected.

I also cover Claude Fable 5 pricing, usage limits, reasoning effort, safety limits, and what happens when Claude switches back to Opus 4.8.

This is my first look at Claude Fable 5, and I’ll keep testing it more with Claude Code, Claude Design, and bigger AI coding tasks. *Free Claude Code Guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/x4eh

I test Claude Fable 5 to see if it is really better than Opus 4.8 and worth the higher cost.
Here is the official Claude Mythos 5 / Fable 5 post: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-fable-5-mythos-5

Claude just released two new models: Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5. I walk through what makes them different, who can use each one, and why Mythos 5 is still locked down.

I also test Claude Fable 5 inside Claude and Claude Design. I use it for slides, coding demos, interactive projects, and prompt tests so you can see how it performs in real use.

I compare Claude Fable 5 with Opus 4.8 on a Sim City style game, an AI history timeline, a solar system demo, and an ecosystem simulator. Some results are much better with Fable 5. Some are closer than I expected.

I also cover Claude Fable 5 pricing, usage limits, reasoning effort, safety limits, and what happens when Claude switches back to Opus 4.8.

This is my first look at Claude Fable 5, and I’ll keep testing it more with Claude Code, Claude Design, and bigger AI coding tasks.

videos.title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Now Gemini
videos.summary_source_text:

At WWDC 2026, Apple revealed a rebuilt Siri AI with personal context, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, writing tools, cross-device conversations, and deeper integration across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and Vision Pro. But investors were not impressed, Apple shares fell after the keynote, the new Siri AI is reportedly tied to Google Gemini, and the EU will not get it on iPhones and iPads at launch.

videos.title: Which PGA TOUR Pros are in danger of missing the FedExCup Playoffs? | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
Which PGA TOUR Pros are in danger of missing the FedExCup Playoffs? | The Drop The Drop is ready to preview the RBC Canadian Open, but first we look back to last week’s tournament – where eventual runner-up Ryan Gerard played his pro-am round on Wednesday with pro football Hall-of-Famer Peyton Manning. The two were mic’d up for the round and we follow them around to hear all the action as they made their way around Muirfield Village. Three different rookies have had a hole-in-one on TOUR this season, and we relive all of them – ending with A.J. Ewart, a 27-year-old Canadian who is getting ready to play in his nation’s national championship this week. Ewart joined the show to talk about getting his TOUR card, how he’s played in his rookie year and he tells us what the most Canadian thing about him is. And with two months before the start of the FedExCup Playoffs, we’ll break down some of the biggest names on TOUR who are still struggling to stay inside that top 70 bubble.

videos.title: How To Soft Catch A Pass With Your 10-2 Footwork
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Soft Catch A Pass With Your 10-2 Footwork The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

TaylorMade just expanded the line up of their mallet putters taking all the learnings and experience from years on tour & added multiple new models.

videos.summary_source_text:
The Easiest Way to Spot Real Food We spend a lot of time debating calories, macros, and nutrition labels, but there may be a simpler way to think about food. Humans are part of nature, and for most of history, food came directly from nature too. The more food resembles something that grows, lives, or comes from the earth, the more likely it is to provide what the body was designed to work with.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 BEST Potassium Food Most people think bananas are the best source of potassium, but there’s actually a much better option. In this video, Dr. Berg reveals the #1 potassium-rich food on the planet and explains why many commonly recommended “high-potassium foods” may not be as healthy as you think.

🌟10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4tUq54D

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

Learn the hidden downside of foods like bananas, potatoes, sweet potatoes, plantains, and beans. While these foods contain potassium, they’re also packed with starches and sugars that can spike blood sugar and cause bloating for many people. Dr. Berg breaks down the difference between potassium-rich foods that support your health and those that may work against your metabolism.

Dr. Eric Berg, DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the author of the best-selling book "The Healthy Keto Plan" and is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals. He no longer practices but focuses on health education through social media.

videos.title: Inkomstkvadranten: fyra sätt att tjäna pengar
videos.summary_source_text:
Inkomstkvadranten: fyra sätt att tjäna pengar Kiyosakis inkomstkvadrant delar in inkomstkällor i fyra: anställd (E), egenföretagare (S), affärsägare (B) och investerare (I). De flesta börjar i E och S, där man säljer sin tid. B och I handlar om system och kapital som arbetar utan direkt tidsinsats.

Ur RT:s perspektiv är regelbundet sparande i indexfonder ett konkret sätt att röra sig mot I-kvadranten. Du behöver inte starta ett bolag eller bli fastighetsmäklare. Det räcker med att kapitalet börjar växa automatiskt.

Mer om passivt sparande och ekonomisk frihet finns på rikatillsammans.se och i RikaTillsammans-podden.

videos.title: Stop Coming Over the Top #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Coming Over the Top #golfswing #golftips If you struggle with slicing or coming over the top, this drill will fix it fast.
Stick a headcover on an alignment stick through your bag to create a visual barrier — your goal is to swing under the cover.
If your hands move out or you start down steep, you’ll hit it. When you start down with the lower body first and stay patient with your arms, the club shallows, slots, and gets perfectly on plane.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. If you struggle with slicing or coming over the top, this drill will fix it fast.

videos.title: IF YOU GET SICK OFTEN, THIS COULD BE THE REASON | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
IF YOU GET SICK OFTEN, THIS COULD BE THE REASON | Dr. Mandell Do you seem to catch every cold that's going around while others rarely get sick? If you're getting sick more often than you'd like, your immune system may not be getting the support it needs. In this video, Dr. Mandell explains why two of the most important nutrients for immune health—vitamin C and zinc—work together to help support your body's natural defense system. Learn how vitamin C supports white blood cells, helps protect immune cells from oxidative stress, and plays a critical role in healthy immune function. You'll also discover how zinc helps regulate immune cell activity, communication, and development, making it one of the most important minerals for a healthy immune response.

One of the most fascinating aspects of these nutrients is how they work synergistically. Vitamin C helps support and protect immune cells, while zinc helps regulate and coordinate the immune response. Together, they form a powerful partnership that supports your body's natural defenses. Dr. Mandell also discusses the importance of sleep, stress management, exercise, hydration, and nutrition, all of which play a major role in maintaining a strong and resilient immune system.

Whenever possible, it's best to obtain these nutrients from food. Excellent sources of vitamin C include citrus fruits, oranges, grapefruit, lemons, kiwi, strawberries, bell peppers, broccoli, Brussels sprouts, tomatoes, and other colorful fruits and vegetables. Rich sources of zinc include oysters, beef, poultry, pumpkin seeds, chickpeas, lentils, beans, nuts, seeds, and other protein-rich foods. A nutrient-dense diet combined with healthy lifestyle habits can help provide the foundation your immune system needs to function at its best.

A strong immune system isn't built overnight, but consistently giving your body the nutrients it needs may help support optimal immune function, overall wellness, and long-term health. Watch until the end to learn simple strategies that can help support your body's natural defenses and keep you feeling your best year-round.

Suggested Daily Intake Discussed In This Video:

Vitamin C: 250–1,000 mg daily

Zinc: 10–20 mg daily

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini in 2026: Which One Is Actually Worth Your Money?
videos.summary_source_text:
ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini in 2026: Which One Is Actually Worth Your Money? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
You're paying for an AI assistant right now—and there's a decent chance it's the wrong one for the work you actually do. "Best AI" stopped being a real answer in 2026, so this is the comparison the thumbnails never do honestly.

We go through ChatGPT (GPT-5.5), Claude (Opus 4.8), and Gemini (3.5 Flash) — not on which one is "smartest," but on which one fits real professional work: long documents, coding, data analysis, writing, and the tools you live in all day. We separate what's actually measurable from what's just vendor marketing, including the app-vs-API context window trap that catches almost everyone.

By the end you'll know which one is worth your money for YOUR job:
- ChatGPT — the broad platform generalist (60+ integrations, messy multi-tool days)
- Claude — the deep-work specialist (1M-token API context, code + docs + reasoning)
- Gemini — the native Google operator (baked into Workspace, aggressive pricing)

Plus the benchmark reality check nobody wants to admit: the clean, independent three-way scoreboard everyone pretends to have basically doesn't exist yet.

No hype. Just the evidence. That's the BitBiased mission.

📌 Which one are you leaning toward—and what work do you actually do? Drop it in the comments. I read those, and they shape the next deep dive.

Liam From Golf Mates Couldn't Compress His Irons... Watch What Changed Can a simple setup change completely transform your iron game? In this video, Liam from Golf Mates joins Alex Elliott to work on one of the biggest issues amateur golfers face: compressing their irons consistently.

Check out Liam's channel right here: @GolfMates  

Like many golfers, Liam was struggling to create that crisp, powerful strike that better players seem to achieve effortlessly. After making one simple adjustment to his iron setup, the results were immediate.

In this lesson, you'll discover:

The setup mistake that costs golfers distance and consistency, How to create better compression with your irons, Why ball first contact is easier than you think, A simple drill you can use on the range today, How Tour Pros set up differently to most amateurs

videos.title: Which Hockey Skate Profile is Right For Me? // Inside Look
videos.summary_source_text:
Which Hockey Skate Profile is Right For Me? // Inside Look Finding the right blade profile can transform how your skates feel on the ice. Chase from IW joins JP from Elite Blade Performance to break down profile families, on-ice testing, sharpening hollow adjustments, and the best ways to preserve your setup over time. Learn how to find the profile and sharpening combination that best complements your game.
 
In this in-depth interview, we cover:
✅ Choosing the right blade profile family
✅ Matching a profile to your game
✅ Properly testing a new profile on the ice

videos.title: WWDC 2026: Apple Just Rebuilt Your iPhone Into an AI Machine
videos.summary_source_text:
WWDC 2026: Apple Just Rebuilt Your iPhone Into an AI Machine Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
You gave up on Siri years ago. So did most people. But WWDC 2026 wasn't a Siri update at all — it was Apple quietly rebuilding the entire iPhone into an AI machine, and almost nobody framed it that way.

In this breakdown I cut through the keynote and look at what Apple actually announced: what normal users get from Siri AI, Photos, Safari, Home, and the expanded family safety tools — what developers get from Foundation Models, App Intents, Core AI, MLX, and Metal 4 — and how the whole thing stacks up against Google, Microsoft, and Meta. No hype, just what the evidence shows.
We also dig into the parts most coverage skipped: the staggered regional rollout, the developer-adoption dependency that could make or break Siri, the Private Cloud Compute privacy claims you can actually audit, and the quiet iCloud+ monetization tell buried in Apple's own summary.
A keynote is a promise. Shipping is the proof. Here's where Apple actually stands.

⏱️ Chapters
00:00 Why WWDC 2026 wasn't a Siri update
00:37 Orienting on the keynote
01:06 The one-sentence version
01:46 What ordinary people actually get
02:53 The upgrades beyond Siri
04:01 The catch most coverage skips
04:35 The part that actually got me interested
05:53 The dependency problem
06:28 The deeper developer stack
07:24 Privacy and Private Cloud Compute
08:00 Why privacy isn't the whole story
08:37 Apple vs Google
09:11 Apple vs Microsoft
09:58 Apple vs Meta
10:31 The business-model tell everyone overlooked
11:55 Why I'm still cautious
12:20 What to watch next

Did Apple finally fix Siri's strategic problem, or just repackage the same AI race in a nicer wrapper? Drop your take in the comments — I read them.

👉 Subscribe for the same no-hype, evidence-based treatment on every major AI release.

videos.title: Saab-Fenix skulle fått en revolutionerande elbakaxel!
videos.summary_source_text:
Saab-Fenix skulle fått en revolutionerande elbakaxel! Del 3 i serien om Saab-Fenixprojektet: Elbakaxeln

Det handlar om det nya elbakaxeln som skulle ge nya 9-3 låg förbrukning, bättre köregenskaper och bra framkomlighet.Man tog fram den tillsammans med American Axle & Manufacturing.


Bakgrund:
Efterföljaren till den sista generationen Saab 9-3 hade kommit mycket långt, när Saab gick i konkurs. Projekt 540, eller Phoenix/Fenix,  hade bland annat en ny avancerad bak- och framvagn, ny drivlina och även en elbakaxel på gång.
Anders Johansson och Gabriel Palmenäs (som givetvis jobbade på Saab när det begav sig) driver företaget Griffin Cars, och har köpt upp ett restlager av axlar och motorer för att modernisera befintliga Saab 9-3 bilar.
Men den stora planen är att bygga en liten serie moderna bilar, med äkta Saabteknik! (Det återkommer vi till längre fram)
I en serie intervjuer med Saab-folk som var med och utvecklade Fenixplattformen, ska vi tala teknik, men givetvis också provköra en av de uppdaterade bilarna.
I filmerna:
Del 1: bakgrund och framtidsversion
Del 2: Chassit – Gunnar Olsson
och Per Janssson
Del 3: Elbakaxel, Stefan Barbunopulos
Del 4: Motor, Peter Dahl
Del 5: Provkörning!

Se till att prenumerera så du inte missar något!

Se filmerna utan reklam före alla andra: 
Bli gärna medlem och stöd kanalen, som blir reklamfri! 29 kr/månad
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCU-4UJDGqQWK5Iv4wXDlzGQ/join

⚡️ Köp eller sälj elbil via Carla: https://carla.se

videos.title: Saab-Fenix skulle få världens bästa chassi
videos.summary_source_text:
Saab-Fenix skulle få världens bästa chassi Del 2 i serien om Saab-Fenixprojektet.
Det handlar om det nya chassit som skulle bli världens bästa.

Bakgrund:
Efterföljaren till den sista generationen Saab 9-3 hade kommit mycket långt, när Saab gick i konkurs. Projekt 540, eller Phoenix/Fenix,  hade bland annat en ny avancerad bak- och framvagn, ny drivlina och även en elbakaxel på gång.
Anders Johansson och Gabriel Palmenäs (som givetvis jobbade på Saab när det begav sig) driver företaget Griffin Cars, och har köpt upp ett restlager av axlar och motorer för att modernisera befintliga Saab 9-3 bilar.
Men den stora planen är att bygga en liten serie moderna bilar, med äkta Saabteknik! (Det återkommer vi till längre fram)
I en serie intervjuer med Saab-folk som var med och utvecklade Fenixplattformen, ska vi tala teknik, men givetvis också provköra en av de uppdaterade bilarna.
I filmerna:
Del 1: bakgrund och framtidsversion
Del 2: Chassit – Gunnar Olsson
och Per Janssson
Del 3: Elbakaxel, Stefan Barbunopulos
Del 4: Motor, Peter Dahl
Del 5: Provkörning!

Se till att prenumerera så du inte missar något!

Se filmerna utan reklam före alla andra: 
Bli gärna medlem och stöd kanalen, som blir reklamfri! 29 kr/månad

videos.title: How To Putt Like a Pro | Part 2 | Padraig Harrington
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Putt Like a Pro | Part 2 | Padraig Harrington As part of my YouTube series  “Ten lessons every golfer should know”, the fifth Paddy’s Golf Tip is on putting, which is in two parts. 
 
In the second instalment,  I explain how to read the greens, discuss the importance of pace of putts and why the phrase "never up, never in" is useless!

I demonstrate how to use your feet to provide an initial read, how to use the different colours of the greens, as well as the fraying around the hole to read the speed and break of a putt and why aiming high generally finishes closer than a putt hit on the low side. 

#padraigharrington #golfing #golftips #paddysgolftips #golf #feedback #putting 

SUBSCRIBE FOR MORE CONTENT: https://bit.ly/4gKoVme

About Padraig Harrington: 

Born in Dublin, Padraig is a proud family man married to Caroline with two children, Patrick and Ciaran. As a three time major champion, Padraig is one of the world’s top golfers and his playing record speaks for itself. Following a very successful amateur career, including winning the Walker Cup in 1995 at Royal Porthcawl in one of his three appearances, he turned professional in September 1995.

videos.title: 468. Sparkvoten gör folk rika, inte smarta investeringar
videos.summary_source_text:
468. Sparkvoten gör folk rika, inte smarta investeringar Många tror att vi investerat oss rika. Sanningen är tråkigare: vi sparade oss rika på inkomst, låga utgifter och tid.

Detta är ett avsnitt som handlar lite mer om vår personliga och ekonomiska resa än det praktiska kring sparande. Hur en hög sparkvot och tjugo år av hårt arbete byggde vår ekonomi och varför rädsla snarare än smarta investering var den stora drivkraften.

Vi pratar om pappa som dog tidigt, Carolines dubbla budskap om pengar hemifrån, frågan som vände allt och varför det svåraste inte är att spara utan att tillåta sig att leva. Oliver lotsar oss genom era läsarfrågor om tur, ånger och att våga skryta lite.


🔗 Länkar från avsnittet:
Bästa fonderna: https://rikatillsammans.se/spara-och-investera/basta-fonderna/
Die with Zero av Bill Perkins: https://rikatillsammans.se/studier/die-with-zero-av-bill-perkins/
Fyra-hinkar-modellen: https://rikatillsammans.se/spara-och-investera/fyra-hinkar-modellen/
Rikedomstrappan: https://rikatillsammans.se/spara-och-investera/rikedomstrappan/

Avsnittet på hemsidan: 
https://rikatillsammans.se/avsnitt/pengar-radslor-och-bristtank/

📌 Stötta oss på Patreon: 
https://www.patreon.com/join/rikatillsammans

💬 Diskutera avsnittet i forumet:
https://rikatillsammans.se/forum/t/123364

📬 Nyhetsbrevet:
https://rikatillsammans.se/om-oss/nyhetsbrev/

⏱️ Kapitel:
Innehållsförteckning
00:00:00 - Intro till avsnittet
00:02:20 - Vem uppvaktade vem och var det kärlek vid första ögonkastet?

#privatekonomi #sparande #ekonomiskfrihet #rikatillsammans Många tror att vi investerat oss rika. Sanningen är tråkigare: vi sparade oss rika på inkomst, låga utgifter och tid.

Detta är ett avsnitt som handlar lite mer om vår personliga och ekonomiska resa än det praktiska kring sparande. Hur en hög sparkvot och tjugo år av hårt arbete byggde vår ekonomi och varför rädsla snarare än smarta investering var den stora drivkraften.

Vi pratar om pappa som dog tidigt, Carolines dubbla budskap om pengar hemifrån, frågan som vände allt och varför det svåraste inte är att spara utan att tillåta sig att leva. Oliver lotsar oss genom era läsarfrågor om tur, ånger och att våga skryta lite.

videos.title: THIS was the whole point of Microsoft Builld
videos.summary_source_text:
THIS was the whole point of Microsoft Builld Is @Microsoft quietly trying to step out of OpenAI’s shadow? 

During my chat with Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman at #MicrosoftBuild2026, he made their goal crystal clear: Microsoft wants the capacity to build the "absolute frontier" of AI models in house and entirely from scratch.

Which is a departure from what they've been doing for the past few years of integrating OpenAI's models into their products. 

He also gave a really interesting answer about AI scraping for training data and I'm curious if it makes you want to give them a try more....

videos.title: New Audi Q7 just DESTROYED BMW
videos.summary_source_text:
New Audi Q7 just DESTROYED BMW The all-new Audi Q7 has been revealed, and we’re going to explore the exterior and interior changes, coupled with the back seat space, the engine choices, and the price. 

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-04-07

This is the all-new Audi Q7! 

Audi’s competitor to the BMW X7 and Mercedes GLS has had a full design refresh, and Mat’s flown over to Germany to see what’s changed. So what exactly is new? Let’s get into it… 

Starting with the exterior design, it’s fair to say that the new Q7 certainly stands out. Up front there’s a huge, illuminated grille, and this is flanked by a pair of OLED headlights. It’s also worth noting that the headlights are absolutely fantastic - there are several different light signatures, and the full beams can act as a projector when you approach/walk away from the car! Along the side, the Q7 comes with up to 23-inch alloy wheels, and the rear pillar of the car has been lifted to allow more space for people in the third row. Around the back, there are OLED taillights, a full-length light bar, and (finally!) the return of real exhaust tips! 

The inside of the Q7 is also super smart, especially with the wood trim that we have in this car. There’s a huge curved dial and infotainment screen, although as in other recent Audis, it has an insanely large bezel around it! Still though, the cabin is well laid out, and it’s (mostly) covered in soft touch materials. There’s lots of storage, the seats are incredibly comfortable, and the new drive selector stalks are a great touch. 

The Q7 currently comes with a 3-litre V6 diesel that can produce 245hp or 300hp. It comes with mild hybrid tech to allow for some driving on electric power alone, and both petrol and plug-in hybrid options are due to be available as well. 

The new Q7 will start from around £75,000 when it goes on sale. But do these all-new looks and the incredible light technology offer enough to sway you away from BMW or Mercedes? Stick with Mat to see for yourself!

Mat’s configured a second-hand Q7: https://bit.ly/Mats-Choice-0407

There’s lots of storage, the seats are incredibly comfortable, and the new drive selector stalks are a great touch. 

The Q7 currently comes with a 3-litre V6 diesel that can produce 245hp or 300hp. It comes with mild hybrid tech to allow for some driving on electric power alone, and both petrol and plug-in hybrid options are due to be available as well. 

The new Q7 will start from around £75,000 when it goes on sale. But do these all-new looks and the incredible light technology offer enough to sway you away from BMW or Mercedes? Stick with Mat to see for yourself!

Mat’s configured a second-hand Q7: https://bit.ly/Mats-Choice-0407

Chapters
00:00 Intro
00:30 Lights
02:13 Design
03:06 Interior
04:59 Back Seats
09:13 Boot
11:28 Engines
11:51 Price
videos.summary: New Audi Q7 just DESTROYED BMW The all-new Audi Q7 has been revealed, and we’re going to explore the exterior and interior changes, coupled with the back seat space, the engine choices, and the price. Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: This is the all-new Audi Q7.

videos.title: We Mic’d Up a Pro Golfer for 72 holes… And he ended up WINNING!
videos.summary_source_text:
We Mic’d Up a Pro Golfer for 72 holes… And he ended up WINNING! For the first time ever, a WINNER was mic’d up for all 72 holes of a victory in a PGA TOUR-sanctioned event. 

Korn Ferry Tour pro Cole Sherwood was mic'd up from Thursday to Sunday at the 2026 Colonial Life Charity Classic during the filming of Korn Ferry Presents... And then ended up winning the entire tournament.

videos.title: How To Hit Your Irons Straighter In Golf
videos.summary_source_text: How To Hit Your Irons Straighter In Golf Your wrist angles are one of the biggest influencers in how straight (or not) you hit your golf shots. In this video we take a look at the mistakes amateur golfers make in their golf swings, and how to correct them in order to hit your iron shots straighter and more consistently. Your wrist angles are one of the biggest influencers in how straight (or not) you hit your golf shots. videos.title: BETTING ON RED! Carolina Hurricanes Seeking to Even Stanley Cup Final in Game 4
videos.summary_source_text:
BETTING ON RED! Carolina Hurricanes Seeking to Even Stanley Cup Final in Game 4 It's a must-win Game 4 for the Carolina Hurricanes as they seek to avoid going 3-1 in the Stanley Cup Final against the Vegas Golden Knights. They have not lost back-to-back games in the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs; does that streak stay alive on Tuesday night? What are the main storylines heading into Game 4 as the Hurricanes hope to split on the road in Las Vegas before returning home for Game 5 on Thursday? On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the first of two main storylines heading into Game 4: the lines from practice on Monday. It seems Rod Brind'Amour is going to keep the lines blended up instead of going back to the regular lines that we've seen for most of the playoffs. Will starting with those lines be easier instead of going to them later on? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the second main storyline: who starts in the net for Game 4? Brind'Amour stated that they made their decision, but will hold onto it until the game begins. Who do we think it is, and why play the cloak-and-dagger on the goalie for Game 4? Finally, Zach shares his players to watch, Canes to Click, and some keys to the game. Who will score for the Hurricanes in Game 4 and who should we hope to see step up? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: 08.06.26 - Rift Walk-through Including NEW Smart Money Feature with Joe
videos.summary_source_text:
08.06.26 - Rift Walk-through Including NEW Smart Money Feature with Joe 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

videos.title: Hindi - 08.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 08.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Joe Sakic Set to Meet the Media Thursday. What Can We Expect?
videos.summary_source_text:
Joe Sakic Set to Meet the Media Thursday. What Can We Expect? Colorado Avalanche face pivotal offseason changes as Joe Sakic prepares to address the media amid speculation about coaching shakeups—will Dave Hakstol be the fall guy after a disappointing power play and playoff exit?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson dissect Avalanche front office moves, Chris MacFarland's departure to Nashville, and the ongoing debate over Hakstol’s future behind the bench. The spotlight turns to the looming contracts of stars like Cale Makar and intriguing free agent projections for defensemen Nick Blankenburg and Brett Kulak. Plus, the hosts grade Jack Drury’s breakout season and test their hockey acumen with a challenging 82–0 Cap Wages roster-building game, building dream lineups from Avalanche history.

Will Sakic’s loyalty keep familiar faces around, or are bold changes coming to revitalize Colorado's Stanley Cup hopes?
